name: 69 Pro Climate Sensor, VPD, Temperature, and Humidity Readings, 1 inch
notes: Model AC-SPB1, 3.5mm plug, 1 inch (2.5cm) probe. Compatible with T-Series controllers (CLOUDLINE, AIRLIFT, AIRTITAN, AIRBLAZE, CLOUDWAY). Short probe for wide area detection.

name: 69 Pro Climate Sensor, VPD, Temperature, and Humidity Readings, 20 ft
notes: Model AC-SPB20, 3.5mm plug, 50cm stainless steel probe, 6.1m (20ft) cord. Compatible with T-Series controllers. Long cord for spot detection in HVAC ducts.

name: UIS Controller to Device Cable, L-Shaped Male to Male, 10 ft (for Controller 69 Pro/Pro+)
notes: 3m (10ft), L-shaped right-angle connector. Designed for Controller 69 Pro/Pro+. Works with CLOUDRAY, CLOUDLINE, IONFRAME, CLOUDFORGE.

name: AI Climate Sensor, for VPD, Temperature, and Humidity Readings
notes: Model AC-SPC24, UIS connector, 24ft (7.3m) cable, Swiss-made thermal alloy probe, IP44. Amazon.de lists this as 'Controller Sensor Probe for Controller AI+' 6m version (may differ slightly in cable length).

name: AI CO2 + Light Sensor, for CO2 Data Tracking, Optimized FAE, Day & Night Scheduling
notes: Also measures light levels. Exclusive to Controller AI+. Enables dynamic fan programming based on CO2 PPM and day/night scheduling.

name: AI Hydro Sensor, for pH, EC, TDS and Water Temperature Data Tracking
notes: Model AC-HDS3. Measures pH, EC, TDS, salinity, and water temperature. Interchangeable probes. Amazon.com ASIN: B0F67HRPSC. Shipped from March 2026. Not confirmed on Amazon.de.

name: AI Soil Sensor, for Moisture and Saturation Level Monitoring, IP67
notes: IP67 rated, removable stem. Exclusive to Controller AI+. Monitors substrate moisture and saturation levels.

name: AI Water Sensor, for Liquid Presence Detection, IP68
notes: IP68 rated, suction and magnetic mounting. Detects water presence/flooding in grow spaces. Exclusive to Controller AI+.

name: AI and 69 Pro UIS Controller to Device Cable, Female to Male, 10 ft
notes: 3m (10ft), water-resistant gasket. Compatible with Controller AI+, 69 Pro, 69 Pro+. Extends UIS controller connection to CLOUDRAY, CLOUDLINE, IONFRAME, CLOUDFORGE and more.

name: AI and 69 Pro UIS Controller to Device Cable, Male to Male, 10 ft
notes: 3m (10ft), water-resistant gasket. Amazon.com ASIN: B0DPJDC46R. Not confirmed on Amazon.de. Male-to-male variant for device-to-device extension.

name: Molex to UIS Port Adapter Dongle, Conversion Cable Cord
notes: Converts 4-pin Molex connectors of older EC fans (CLOUDLINE, AIRLIFT, CLOUDWAY) to UIS port for use with UIS controllers. Model AC-ADP3.

name: RJ11 2-in-1 Daisy Chaining Adapter Dongle for UIS LED Grow Lights
notes: Model AC-ADS3. L-shaped sequential connector for daisy-chaining multiple UIS LED grow lights (IONBEAM, IONBOARD, IONFRAME) via RJ11 ports.

name: UIS 1-to-1 Wireless Transmitter and Receiver, 2-Pack
notes: 2.4GHz, 26ft (8m) max range. Replaces wired UIS connector cords between devices and controllers. One transmitter + one receiver per pack.

name: UIS 2-in-1 Splitter, Daisy-Chain Adapter Dongle
notes: L-shaped right-angle piggyback connector. Links same-type UIS devices (EC fans, LED grow lights) in a sequential daisy-chain from a single controller port.

name: UIS Control Plug, for Outlet-Powered Equipment
notes: Connects UIS controllers to outlet-powered devices (humidifiers, heaters, dehumidifiers, A/Cs). Includes 10ft UIS cord. Max 1800W. Works with Controller 69, 69 Pro, AI+.

name: UIS Lighting Adapter Type-A, for RJ11/12 Connector Lights with PWM or 0-10V Dimmers
notes: Connects UIS controllers to third-party grow lights with RJ11/RJ12 connectors using PWM or 0-10V current sourcing dimming. Includes extension cable.

name: UIS Lighting Adapter Type-B, for RJ11/12 Connector Lights with Resistor Dimmers
notes: Connects UIS controllers to third-party grow lights with RJ11/RJ12 connectors using resistor dimming. Includes extension cable. Listed as temporarily out of stock on Amazon.de.

name: UIS Lighting Adapter Type-D, for LED Grow Lights with Dimmer Control Wire Drivers
notes: 0-10V DIM+/DIM- wire terminal connector. For third-party LED drivers (Meanwell, Sosen, MOSO, Inventronics) with dimming control wires.

name: UIS Power Adapter, Outlet Plug with Charger Cable Cord
notes: Powers UIS controllers (Controller 69, 69 WiFi, 69 Pro) that are not powered by UIS devices. Type-A/B compatible outlet plug with charging cable.

name: UIS Splitter Hub, 4-Port, Adapter Dongle for Shared Programming
notes: Splits one UIS controller port to 4 same-type UIS devices (fans, lights, humidifiers) for shared synchronized programming.

name: UIS to Molex Port Adapter Dongle, Conversion Cable Cord
notes: Reverse adapter: converts UIS connectors of newer fans (CLOUDRAY, CLOUDLINE LITE) to Molex port for older controllers (Controller 67, UNC529). Amazon.com ASIN: B0NQRVW5G. Not confirmed on Amazon.de.

name: AC Power Adapter for Autopilot CO2 Generators
notes: SKU APCGPA; 120V AC power adapter for Autopilot natural gas/propane CO2 generators; used when operating generator without a controller

name: Autopilot Analog to Digital Conversion Module V2
notes: SKU APBC1001; converts 0-10V and 0-11.5V analog signal to RS-485 digital; two zones each controlling 256 fixtures (512 total); enables analog environmental controllers to drive smart LED/HID fixtures

name: Autopilot Digital CO2 Controller Fuzzy Logic Replacement Probe
notes: SKU APCECODRP; replacement CO2 sensor probe for APCECOD Digital CO2 Controller with Fuzzy Logic

notes: SKU APCECOTHRP; CO2 + light combo replacement probe for APCECOTH Greenhouse Master Controller; 15 ft cable

notes: SKU APCEIC; USB-to-PC cable plus Windows software for remote monitoring and data logging of Greenhouse Master Controller; Windows-only, not Mac/smartphone compatible

notes: SKU APRJUSB15; individual USB-to-RJ12 cable connecting Phantom DE ballast USB port to RJ12 splitter; also included in PHCBPK pack

name: 20' Mini 3P(M) to Mini 3P(F) WT Data Link Cable, IP65, RF
notes: SKU CHC223108W; RF-shielded IP65 data link cable for chaining PHOTOBIO CX LED fixtures in Autopilot PX2 control network

name: 20' RJ(M) to Mini 3P(F) WT Controller Adapter Data Cable, RF
notes: SKU CHC223212W; connects Autopilot PX2 controller to Phantom HPS/DE ballasts via RJ12 data link for dimming and on/off control

name: Bluelab pH Probe 5M (PROBPH5M)
notes: Same double-junction BNC pH probe as PROBPH but with 5m cable for hard-to-reach locations.

name: Bluelab pH Probe (PROBPH)
notes: Double-junction replacement pH probe with standard BNC connector, 2m cable. Compatible with all Bluelab meters, monitors, and controllers with BNC connection.

name: Bluelab Soil pH Probe (PROBPHLEAP / Leap pH Probe)
notes: Reinforced spear-tip pH probe for soil, coco, rockwool and substrate. BNC connection, 2m cable. SKU PROBPHLEAP. Bluelab website now lists this as 'Soil pH Probe'.

name: Bluelab Connect Range Extender 2 (CONEXTEND2)
notes: Wireless range extender for Bluelab Connect Stick 2 and Connect devices. Extends range 4x (up to 1600m in open space). Multiple units can be chained.

name: Bluelab Connect Stick 2 (CONSTICK2)
notes: USB wireless receiver for Bluelab Connect devices (Guardian Monitor Connect, Pro Controller Connect, etc.). Enables wireless data logging to Bluelab Connect Software. One stick can receive from up to 50 Connect devices.

name: Bluelab pH Probe Inline (PROBPHIN)
notes: Inline replacement pH probe for Guardian Monitor Connect Inline. 3/4" NPT thread for pipe mounting, 3m cable, rated to 7 bar (100 psi).

name: Bluelab Sample Tube and Fittings (SAMTUB)
notes: Inline sampling adapter for mounting probes into a sample line from reservoir (for reservoirs up to 2m from controller). Includes shut-off valves. Max 15 psi. Compatible with Guardian Monitor Wi-Fi and Pro Controller Wi-Fi.

name: Bluelab EnviroSensor IntelliClimate CO2 Sensor
notes: Combined CO2/temperature/humidity/light environment sensor for IntelliClimate climate controller. Used as replacement or second sensor for grow spaces larger than 10m x 10m. CO2 resolution 50 ppm, range 0-5000 ppm.

name: Bluelab Power Relay R4
notes: 4-output individually controlled relay expansion module for IntelliClimate and IntelliDose. Controls mains-powered devices (heaters, humidifiers, dehumidifiers, CO2 equipment, lighting).

name: Bluelab Intelligent EC Probe 5m for IntelliDose (PROBINTEC)
notes: Replacement EC/conductivity probe specifically for IntelliDose controller (BCTIND01). 5m cable. SKU PROBINTEC / K4306.

name: Bluelab IntelliLink (BMCINL01)
notes: Wi-Fi / Ethernet gateway adding internet connectivity to IntelliDose and IntelliClimate controllers. Connects via router to Edenic cloud software for remote monitoring/control. Handles up to 4 Intelli devices.

name: Bluelab Sample Pot incl. Fittings (BMCSPT01)
notes: Probe positioning chamber for setups where reservoir is more than 2m from the controller. Allows direct nutrient solution measurement with probes. Includes fittings and calibration solutions.

name: Bluelab Temperature Probe (PROBTEMP)
notes: Replacement temperature probe for Bluelab pH Controller, pH Controller Connect, and Pro Controller Connect. Plug-in jack, 2m cable.

name: Bluelab External Lockout and Alarm Box (PROEXBOX)
notes: Expansion box for Pro Controller. Connects external float switches or irrigation controllers to trigger dosing lockout. Supports 'normally open' and 'normally closed' switches. Includes audible alarm output.

name: Bluelab PeriPod L3 (PERIPODL3)
notes: Large-scale 3-pump peristaltic dosing system for Pro Controller Wi-Fi (1 pH + 2 nutrient, 1200 ml/min each). For high-volume commercial applications.

name: Bluelab PeriPod M3 (PERIPODM3)
notes: 3-pump peristaltic dosing system for Pro Controller Wi-Fi (1 pH + 2 nutrient pumps, 120 ml/min each). Up to 12 units can be linked. Includes dosing cable, tubing, 24V power supply.

name: Bluelab PeriPod M4 (PERIPODM4)
notes: 4-pump peristaltic dosing system for Pro Controller Wi-Fi (1 pH + 3 nutrient pumps, 120 ml/min each). Up to 12 units can be linked.

name: Bluelab PowerPod (POWERPODEU)
notes: Electronically controlled mains switching box for Pro Controller. 4 IEC mains outputs (8.5A max total). Enables Pro Controller to control pumps, heaters, coolers via control signals. Available in EU/US/UK/AU plug variants.

name: Bluelab Pro Controller Conductivity Probe (PROBPCEC)
notes: Replacement EC/conductivity probe exclusively for Pro Controller (CONTPRO) and Pro Controller Wi-Fi (BCTPRC02). Fully submersible, 2m cable. Not compatible with Guardian Monitor or Combo Meter.

name: Bluelab Pro Controller to PeriPod Data Cable (SKU 500005)
notes: 1m M12 8-pin to M12 8-pin proprietary data cable connecting Pro Controller to PeriPod M3/M4/L3 dosing units.

name: Gavita 3-Way RJ14 Cable Splitter
notes: Art. 906187. Connects master controller to multiple E-series ballasts in inline configuration. Also listed on Amazon.nl ASIN B01FGE03QA; confirmed available in Germany from indoorgartentechnik.de.

name: Gavita 3-Way Splitter 6P6C (Repeater Bus)
notes: Art. 43.50.10.01. Gray 3-way splitter for Repeater Bus system; 6P6C connector (different from the black RJ14 splitter for single-bus). Used to branch Repeater Bus signal into fixture chains.

name: Gavita Booster B200
notes: SKU HGC906096. Expands EL1/EL2 controller capacity by 200 fixtures per booster (adds 3 extra ports); multiple boosters can be chained. Amazon.com ASIN B01G5Y74JY. Available in Germany via maxgrowshop.de at approx. €149.

name: Gavita Controller Cable RJ9/RJ14 25ft / 7.5m
notes: Long controller cable; connects EL1/EL2 master controller (RJ9) to E-series ballast (RJ14); 7.5m length. Confirmed on Amazon.de.

name: Gavita Controller Cable RJ9/RJ14 5ft / 1.5m
notes: Shortest controller cable; connects EL1/EL2 master controller (RJ9 port) to E-series ballast (RJ14). Amazon.com ASIN B01FGDZQJU. Not confirmed on Amazon.de.

name: Gavita Controller Cable RJ9/RJ14 5m / 16ft
notes: Art. 03-160-355. Connects EL1/EL2 master controller (RJ9) to E-series ballast (RJ14); 5m length. Confirmed on Amazon.de and Amazon.co.uk.

name: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter 120-277V
notes: SKU HGC906151. Inline adapter enabling EL1/EL2 controller compatibility for Gavita 900e and 1700e LED fixtures; runs inline with fixture power cord. Uses RJ45 for daisy-chaining. cETLus listed, IP66 rated. Amazon.com ASIN B098SMGG5D.

name: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter Interconnect Cable 10ft RJ45 to RJ45
notes: SKU HGC906716. Standard daisy-chain cable for E-Series LED adapter network; RJ45 both ends. Amazon.com ASIN B09LPD8ZZD.

name: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter Interconnect Cable 10ft RJ45 to RJ9
notes: SKU HGC906714. Connects E-Series LED adapter network to the EL1/EL2 controller (RJ9 port). Amazon.com ASIN B09LP8HRQP.

name: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter Interconnect Cable 25ft RJ45 to RJ9
notes: SKU HGC906717. Long cable connecting E-Series LED adapter network to EL1/EL2 controller (RJ9). For extended-distance installations.

name: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter Interconnect Cable 3-Way Splitter RJ45
notes: SKU HGC906721/906712. 1-in 2-out RJ45 splitter for E-Series LED adapter network; useful for multi-level racking. Amazon.com ASIN B09LXCZ1RZ.

name: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter Interconnect Cable 80ft Spool
notes: SKU HGC906718. Bulk cable spool for custom-length E-Series LED adapter interconnect runs; requires RJ45 crimp tool and terminals (sold separately).

name: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter Interconnect Cable Terminals RJ45 6-Pack
notes: SKU HGC906711. Replacement RJ45 connector terminals for terminating the 80ft spool cable. Amazon.com ASIN B09H3JXHFJ.

name: Gavita ECM Controller Cable 3m
notes: Low-voltage cable used to connect ECM1 module to Gavita Master Controller EL1/EL2; cage clamp connections on both ends. Also available from UK: £10.95.

name: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module 240V
notes: SKU HGC906083. External contactor module (15A, DPST) with blue LED; switches auxiliary equipment (CO2, humidifier, heating) based on lights-on/off cycle. Up to two ECMs per controller. EU 230/240V version.

name: Gavita Interconnect Cable for Repeater Bus Gray 6P6C 2m / 6.5ft
notes: Gray Repeater Bus cable with 6P6C connectors and ferrite coils on each end to reduce RF interference. For fixtures with dual RJ connectors (Repeater Bus system). Different from the black single-bus interconnect cables.

name: Gavita Interconnect Cable for Repeater Bus Gray 6P6C 3m / 10ft
notes: Longer gray Repeater Bus cable with ferrite coils; 6P6C connectors. For Repeater Bus fixtures (277V/400V systems).

name: Gavita Interconnect Cable RJ14/RJ14 10ft / 300cm
notes: Longest standard daisy-chain cable for single-bus E-series ballasts; RJ14 on both ends.

name: Gavita Interconnect Cable RJ14/RJ14 2ft / 60cm
notes: SKU HGC906180. Short daisy-chain cable for single-bus E-series ballasts; RJ14 on both ends. Amazon.com ASIN B078Y7RRFD. Used to pass control signal from one ballast to the next.

name: Gavita Interconnect Cable RJ14/RJ14 8ft / 240cm
notes: Daisy-chain cable for single-bus E-series ballasts; RJ14 on both ends. Amazon.com ASIN B01G0PWE7U.

name: Gavita Repeater Bus Connection Kit
notes: SKU HGC906170. Custom cabling kit for Repeater Bus fixtures (277V/400V only); includes 25m cable, 8x modular jacks 6P6C, 4x 3-way splitters gray, 2x black ferrites, 4x gray ferrites. Requires RJ12 crimp tool.

name: Gavita Temperature Probe EL Controller Cable 30m / 96ft
notes: SKU HGC906190 (Art. 43.50.00.16). Long-lead temperature probe for large rooms; replacement or extension for EL1/EL2 controller temperature sensor.

name: Gavita Temperature Probe EL Controller Cable 5m / 16ft
notes: SKU HGC906189 (Art. 43.50.00.15). Replacement or extension temperature probe cable for EL1/EL2 master controllers; 3.5mm jack. Also on Amazon.com ASIN B01J37BG58.

name: Gavita EL3-to-Titan Sensor Adapter Cable
notes: SKU HGC906729. Required cable to connect Titan Controls Triton Substrate Sensor or Tali VPD Sensor to the Sensor (Digital) port on the back of the Gavita EL3; approx. 40cm long. Included with EL3 but also sold separately.

name: Titan Controls Tali 3-in-1 VPD Sensor (for Gavita EL3)
notes: SKU HGC702000. Titan Controls brand; measures temperature, humidity, and air pressure to calculate VPD. Connects to Gavita EL3 digital sensor port via EL3-to-Titan Adapter Cable (HGC906729, sold separately). Up to 16 units per EL3. LED display included.

name: Titan Controls Triton Standard Substrate Sensor (for Gavita EL3)
notes: SKU HGC702601. Titan Controls brand; measures EC, VWC (volumetric water content), and substrate temperature. Connects to Gavita EL3 digital sensor port via EL3-to-Titan Adapter Cable (HGC906729, sold separately). Includes 15ft cable and T-connector for daisy-chaining.

name: Cable 2xRJ45 (RJ45 Extension Cable)
notes: RJ45 (male-male) extension cable for connecting sensors, fans, or lights to the controller; compatible with 0-10V and 1-10V systems; available in multiple lengths (0.5m-10m); price shown for 0.5m version

name: Cable for RootSense Substrate Sensor
notes: Replacement or extension cable for RootSense substrate sensors (VWC/pwEC/temperature); used to extend sensor reach within growing medium

name: Cable RJ45-jack plug
notes: Adapter cable from RJ45 to 3.5mm jack plug for connecting EC fans with jack socket input to GrowBase controller

name: Cable RJ45-LUMATEK
notes: 0-10V dimming cable for Lumatek Zeus LED fixtures; enables dimming and sunrise/sunset functions; available in 1m or 3m; Made in Germany

name: Cable RJ45-MountainAir 5m
notes: Proprietary control cable for MountainAir EC fans; 5m length; connects to GrowBase controller RJ45 output

name: Cable RJ45-open ends 0-10V 5m
notes: Cable with RJ45 on controller end and bare wire ends for connecting LED fixtures with 0-10V or 1-10V dimming input; enables sunrise/sunset function; 5m length

name: Cable RJ45-open ends 0-10V/DC Out 5m
notes: Cable with RJ45 on controller end and bare wire ends for 0-10V/1-10V LED dimming; includes additional DC output wires for relay or contactor control; 5m length

name: Cable RJ45-open ends EC
notes: Cable with RJ45 on controller end and open/bare wire ends for EC fans with terminal block connections; 5m length

name: Cable RJ45-Sylvania
notes: 0-10V dimming cable for Sylvania/Gro-Lux LED fixtures; enables dimming and sunrise/sunset functions via GrowBase controller

name: Cable SANlight EVO
notes: 0-10V dimming cable for SANlight EVO series LED fixtures; enables dimming and sunrise/sunset functions; available in 1m or 3m; Made in Germany

name: Cable SANlight Q
notes: 0-10V dimming cable for SANlight Q-series LED fixtures; enables dimming and sunrise/sunset functions via GrowBase controller

name: CarbSense
notes: CO2 sensor for all GrowBase controllers; measuring range 400-2000 ppm; 5m cable; IP40; not a standalone meter, requires controller; Made in Germany

name: CO2-Armatur
notes: Fully assembled CO2 solenoid valve + integrated pressure reducer for CO2 cylinders; W 21.8x1/14" (DIN 477 #6) connection; requires separate GrowBase controller, CarbSense CO2 sensor, and CO2 cylinder; 230V; ~5-20 L/min flow rate

name: Extension mounting arm IRCube 15cm
notes: 15cm extension rod for the IRCube leaf temperature sensor mounting bracket; for repositioning the sensor closer to the plant canopy

name: IRCube
notes: Infrared leaf temperature sensor for VPD control; 30° field of view; ±0.3°C accuracy (22-40°C); 5m cable; 1/4" camera-mount thread for flexible positioning; IP54; Made in Germany

name: PresSense
notes: Negative pressure/differential pressure sensor; measuring range ±200 Pa; includes 5m RJ45 cable and 4m measurement hose; enables automatic intake fan speed regulation; IP40; Made in Germany

name: RJ45-Y 3x female
notes: RJ45 Y-adapter with 3 female ports; allows connecting multiple dimmable LEDs or multiple EC fans to one controller output (0-10/1-10V or EC fan outputs)

name: RootSense add-on sensor kit
notes: Additional sensor probe for expanding an existing RootSense Kit; includes cable, holder, and T-piece; measures VWC, pwEC and substrate temperature

name: RootSense Kit
notes: Substrate sensor kit measuring volumetric water content (VWC), pore water EC (pwEC), and substrate temperature; for irrigation steering and crop management

name: Sensor Humidity & Temperature
notes: Replacement/additional room humidity and temperature sensor; 5m cable, RJ45 plug; protective dust membrane; compatible with all GrowBase models

name: Temperature sensor for Heaters
notes: Temperature probe for enabling the heating mat function on GrowBase controllers; 5-40°C range; ±0.5°C accuracy; 5m cable; compatible with GrowBase, GrowBase Lite, GrowBase Pro, GrowBase EC Pro

name: In/Out-Splitter for GrowBase Pro
notes: Expands GrowBase Pro In/Out ports from 5 to max 10 (up to 5 splitters); includes 0.5m RJ45 cable; not interchangeable with generic RJ45 Y-adapters; GrowBase Pro only

name: Intake Sensor Humidity & Temperature
notes: Supply/intake air version of the humidity & temperature sensor; 12mm thread for mounting in ventilation ducts; black cable gland distinguishes it from the room sensor; requires firmware 5045.0.00.15b or newer

name: PowerExtender 4+
notes: Adds 4 controlled sockets to GrowBase Pro (2x 2300W with inrush current limiter + 0-10V dimming output + DC output); up to 4 units can be chained for 25 total outputs; IP42; connects via RJ45 cable (included); GrowBase Pro only

name: GrowDirector 100 ft Sensor Extension Cable
notes: 30m extension; plug-and-play; compatible with all GrowDirector sensors (temp/humidity, PAR, LUX, soil moisture, CO2); price only available via quote

name: GrowDirector 50 ft Sensor Extension Cable
notes: 15m extension; plug-and-play; compatible with all GrowDirector sensors (temp/humidity, PAR, LUX, soil moisture, CO2); price only available via quote

name: GrowDirector Air Temperature, Humidity & VPD Sensor, 16ft Cable
notes: 5m (16ft) cable version of the standard temp/humidity/VPD sensor; same specs; connects to SensorDirector

name: GrowDirector Air Temperature, Humidity & VPD Sensor
notes: 2m (6.5ft) cable; temp -40 to +80C, humidity 0-100% RH, ±0.3C / ±2% RH accuracy; connects to SensorDirector; also listed on Amazon.com ASIN B0CK4TV3XH but not on Amazon.de

name: GrowDirector CO2 Sensor
notes: 2m (6.5ft) cable; NDIR measurement; range 0-5000 ppm, accuracy ±30 ppm ±3%; connects to SensorDirector; US retailer sale price ($650 regular)

name: GrowDirector DimmerDirector
notes: 0-10V or 0-5V LED grow light dimmer module; controls up to 100 LED grow lights per unit; WiFi-enabled; daisy-chainable; price from AgriExpo

name: GrowDirector DO (Dissolved Oxygen) Sensor
notes: 3m (10ft) cable; range 0-20 mg/L DO, temp 0-50C; connects to HydroDirector; no dedicated shop page found but confirmed available via retailer listings

name: GrowDirector DryContactDirector
notes: 4-channel dry contact relay module (10A per channel); WiFi-enabled; controls high and low-voltage devices including irrigation, lights, fans, alarms; price from AgriExpo

name: GrowDirector EC & Water Temperature Sensor
notes: Industrial grade electrode cable 3m (10ft); EC range 0-10 ms/cm, temp 0-70C; combined EC and water temperature probe; connects to HydroDirector; US retailer sale price ($260 regular)

name: GrowDirector HydroDirector
notes: Hydroponic automation module with 3 integrated dosing pumps (up to 200 ml/min) and 3 sensor ports for pH, EC, DO/ORP; WiFi-enabled; price via quote only

name: GrowDirector LUX Sensor
notes: 2m (6.5ft) cable; measures light intensity in lux; operating temp 0-60C, humidity 0-99% RH; connects to SensorDirector

name: GrowDirector ORP Sensor
notes: Measures oxidation-reduction potential of nutrient solutions; connects to HydroDirector; sold alongside DO sensor; no dedicated manufacturer shop page

name: GrowDirector PAR Sensor
notes: 2m (6.5ft) cable; spectral range 400-750 nm ±5 nm; measures photosynthetically active radiation (PPFD); connects to SensorDirector; price from US retailer FarmTek

name: GrowDirector pH Sensor
notes: Industrial grade electrode cable 3m (10ft); pH range 0-14, temp 0-100C; connects to HydroDirector; price from Growers Supply US retailer

name: GrowDirector SensorDirector
notes: WiFi-enabled sensor hub module; 4 sensor ports; supports temp/humidity, CO2, PAR, LUX, soil moisture sensors; daisy-chainable up to 64,000 sensors; price from AgriExpo listing

name: GrowDirector SocketDirector
notes: Smart outlet module with 2 AC sockets (100-240V, 13/15/16A total); supports Type B/E/F/G plugs; WiFi; controls fans, heaters, chillers, pumps; scalable to 32,000 devices

name: GrowDirector Soil Moisture Sensor
notes: 2m (6.5ft) cable; capacitive sensing; moisture 0-100%, accuracy ±2%/±3%; temp -30 to +70C; connects to SensorDirector; US retailer sale price ($100 regular)

name: GSE Gas Sensor for SMS Alarm Controller
notes: 6m cable; expansion gas leak detection sensor for GSE SMS Alarm Controller; triggers SMS alert on detection

name: GSE Smoke Detector for SMS Alarm Controller
notes: 6m cable and connector; expansion smoke detection sensor for GSE SMS Alarm Controller; triggers SMS alert on detection

name: GSE SMS Alarm Controller Water Detector
notes: 6m cable with plug; expansion flood/water leakage sensor for GSE SMS Alarm Controller; detects conductivity on sensor surface; triggers SMS alert

name: GSE Temp and Humidity Replacement Sensor
notes: SKU 216-455-015; replacement combined temperature and humidity sensor for regular GSE analog/digital fan controllers (not SGC); 4m cable

name: GSE Temp Replacement Sensor
notes: Temperature-only replacement sensor for regular GSE analog/digital fan controllers (not SGC); 4m cable

name: Cable 2x RJ45 (Patch Cable Cat5)
notes: Cat5 patch cable for SGC BUS communication between controller and satellite/expansion units; available in 4m or 5m lengths

name: GSE SGC EC Sensor MA816
notes: Replacement EC probe shaft for SGC EC Conductivity Sensor; PVC shaft; 1m cable to interface + 4m PU cable; automatic temperature compensation

name: PH Electrode Probe BNC Connector
notes: SKU 1549; replacement pH electrode (BNC connector) for SGC PH Acid Sensor; listed as currently unavailable/discontinued

name: Sensor CO2 S300G
notes: SP30; replacement NDIR CO2 sensor chip module (Senseair S300G); 0–50°C operating temp, 0–95% RH; accuracy ±30 ppm ±3%; spare part for G-Systems CO2 S-100 controller

name: SGC 0-10V or PWM Output
notes: SG18; controls EC fans, LED lights, and dimmable ballasts via 0-10V analog or PWM output; also reads RPM; 3 connector types: RJ45 (Primaklima EC fans), 3.5mm stereo jack (Can-Fan EC fans), terminal block; 4m PU cable

name: SGC BUS Distributor 6 Sockets
notes: 6-port BUS connector strip adding 6 addressing ports for sensors and satellites; IP67-sealed waterproof SGC sockets; available with 10m, 20m, or 50m PU cable

name: SGC CO2, Temp., Humidity, Light Sensor
notes: SG16; 4-in-1 NDIR CO2 sensor (0–10,000 ppm ±30 ppm), plus temp, humidity, and light; 4m waterproof PU cable

name: SGC EC Conductivity Sensor
notes: SG15; EC/TDS probe for hydroponics; 0.0–10.0 mS/cm, resolution 0.1 mS/cm; automatic temperature compensation; 1m cable to interface + 4m PU cable; calibration requires SGC full software license

name: SGC Light Sensor
notes: SG13; measures ambient artificial light (0–100%); aluminum tube encapsulation; 4m PU cable with waterproof connector

name: SGC PH Acid Sensor
notes: SG14; pH range 0–14, resolution 0.01 pH, accuracy ±0.01 pH; includes calibration solutions (pH 4.01 and 7.01); 1m BNC coaxial + 4m waterproof PU cable; calibration via SGC software

name: SGC Satellite 12 Relay Exit
notes: SG31; 12 individually programmable dry-contact relay outputs (10A/2300W ohmic, 3A inductive each); DIN-rail mount; occupies only 1 SGC sensor port; includes 4m Chogori BUS cable

name: SGC Satellite 16A Extension Socket
notes: Smart power strip with 6 outlets (16A, 3600W total) controlled via 1 SGC relay output; designed for inductive loads (HPS ballasts); 4m PU cable; EU and CH socket versions

name: SGC Switch - Signal Input
notes: SG17; digital I/O input module for connecting external dry-contact switches, level switches, magnetic contacts, and alarm sensors to SGC; 2-wire terminal block; 4m PU cable

name: SGC Temp., Humidity, Light Sensor
notes: SG12; 3-in-1 sensor measuring temperature (0–60°C ±0.5°C), humidity (±3%RH), and ambient light; 4m waterproof PU cable; for SGC Smart Grow Controller

name: SGC Temperature Sensor
notes: SG10; temperature-only probe (-1°C to +60°C, ±0.5°C accuracy); aluminum tube encapsulation; 4m waterproof PU cable

name: SGC Water Sensor
notes: SG20; water leakage/flood detection sensor with gold-plated sensor tracks; top-coated electronics for humid environments; 4m PU cable

name: INKBIRD IBS-M1 WiFi Gateway
notes: Bridges up to 50 Inkbird Bluetooth/wireless sensors (IBS-TH1, IBS-TH2, IBS-TH2 Plus, ITH-20R, IBS-P01B, etc.) to WiFi for remote monitoring via Inkbird app. Useful for extending grow-room sensor reach to phone/cloud. EUR price from EU store; confirmed on Amazon.de.

name: INKBIRD IBS-M2 WiFi Gateway with Temperature & Humidity Sensor
notes: Newer gateway with built-in T/RH display sensor; Amazon.de ASIN B0BVZK2WWD is the combo set with 3× IBS-TH2 sensors. Standalone gateway also available. Connects up to 9 Inkbird Bluetooth/wireless sensors. Useful for multi-zone grow room monitoring.

name: INKBIRD Replacement CO2 Sensor S01 for ICC-500T
notes: NDIR CO2 replacement sensor module for the ICC-500T programmable CO2 controller for grow rooms/greenhouses. EUR price confirmed on Inkbird EU store. No standalone Amazon.de ASIN found; ICC-500T + S01 combo listed as B0924C7ZW3 on Amazon.de.

name: INKBIRD Replacement Probe for IHC-200 & IHC-200 WIFI
notes: Humidity/temperature combo probe for the IHC-200 dual-outlet humidity controller (humidifier + dehumidifier), widely used in grow rooms and mushroom cultivation. No Amazon.de listing confirmed.

name: INKBIRD K-Type Thermocouple Sensor for PID Temperature Controllers
notes: K-type thermocouple with 2 m cable, range 0–400 °C, 4.5 mm diameter. Sold individually or bundled with heat sink and SSR as PID accessories kit. Compatible with ITC-100VH, ITC-106VH, and similar Inkbird PID controllers used for heating/cooling in grow environments.

name: INKBIRD PT100 Temperature Sensor for PID Temperature Controllers
notes: Waterproof PT100 RTD probe with 1 m cable, range −50 to 250 °C, 4 mm diameter. Available in the PID accessories bundle alongside SSR and heat sink. For grow room or fermentation heating control.

name: INKBIRD SSR Solid State Relay for PID Temperature Controllers (25A or 40A)
notes: 25A or 40A DC-input solid state relay for use with Inkbird PID temperature controllers (ITC-1000, ITC-100VH, ITC-106VH). Load voltage 24–380 VAC, input 3–32 V DC. Required external relay when PID output drives heating/cooling loads. Price from $12.29; also sold as kit on Amazon.de (B01N2XZ4HV) bundled with ITC-100VH + K sensor + heat sink.

name: INKBIRD Replacement 12" NTC Probe for ITC-306T, ITC-308, ITC-1000
notes: 12-inch (30 cm) stainless steel NTC probe; also listed on the EU store at €15.99. Suitable for fermentation vessels, grow reservoirs, incubators.

name: INKBIRD Replacement Aquarium Probe for ITC-308, ITC-306T, ITC-310T, IPB-16S, ITC-308S
notes: Rubber-tipped submersible probe for water/nutrient-solution temperature monitoring in aquaponic or hydroponic grow systems. Amazon.com ASIN B07WG687R7 exists; no Amazon.de listing confirmed.

name: INKBIRD Replacement NTC Probe for ITC-308, ITC-306T, ITC-310T, IPB-16S, ITC-308S
notes: Standard short NTC temperature probe replacement for ITC-308 series temperature controllers used in grow rooms/greenhouses. Confirmed on inkbird.com at $9.99; no standalone Amazon.de listing found.

name: INKBIRD Replacement Probe for ITC-608T, C206T (Temperature or Humidity variant)
notes: 2 m (78.7 in) cable; sold as two variants: temperature probe or humidity probe. EU store lists from €9.99. ITC-608T is commonly used for grow room temperature/humidity control.

name: Mars Hydro PAR Sensor and CO2 Sensor Combo
notes: PAR/PPFD sensor + CO2 sensor without soil sensor; also compatible with iControl and iHub Pro; includes RJ12 T-shape splitter, 3x 3m RJ12 cords, mounting hardware (telescopic rod, clamp); EU product page appears discontinued (404); US retailer still listing it

name: Mars Hydro 2025 iConnectu Smart Controller
notes: Bluetooth/WiFi USB dongle adapter that adds app control (MarsPro app) to compatible Mars Hydro LED grow lights (FC, FC-E, SP3000 series); includes RJ12 expansion port for further connectivity; US ASIN B0CT2PVLVN differs from DE ASIN

name: Mars Hydro iTime 2-in-1 Smart Timer
notes: Dual-outlet smart timer/plug with WiFi and Bluetooth; app control via MarsPro app; 12 programmable on/off settings; integrates with Mars Hydro smart grow ecosystem (iHub/iControl); can run independently without a main controller

name: Mars Hydro 3PCS Smart Soil Sensor Kit
notes: Three 3-in-1 soil sensors each measuring moisture, temperature, and EC (electrical conductivity); for multi-plant or multi-zone monitoring; requires iControl or iHub Pro; pre-order status as of June 2026 with delivery mid-July 2026; EU direct sale only, not found on Amazon.de

name: Mars Hydro iHub-4AC 2.0 Smart Power Strip – Flexible Add-On for iControl Controller
notes: 4-outlet smart power strip expansion module; requires iControl controller to access smart features; daisy-chainable up to 40 units; supports Manual, Timer, Cycle, and Environmental modes; connects via RJ12

name: Mars Hydro Smart Sensor Kit – PPFD, CO₂, and Soil Sensors for iControl & iHub Pro
notes: Bundle of 3 sensors: CO₂ sensor (MH-Sensor-CO2), PPFD/PAR light sensor (MH-Sensor-PAR), soil sensor (MH-Soil-Sensor measuring moisture, temperature, EC); includes 3x RJ12 cables and 3x RJ12 T-shape splitters; requires iControl or iHub Pro

name: Mars Hydro 2025 iFresh MarsPro Add-On Pack
notes: Bundle of iConnect Smart Controller (WiFi/Bluetooth adapter) + Temperature & Humidity Sensor; for iFresh 2025 fan models only (circular cover panel with interface port); enables MarsPro app monitoring of temp, humidity, VPD, wind speed; Amazon.com ASIN B0DZCHSL94 not confirmed on Amazon.de

name: SMSCOM Temperature Protector 16A
notes: Failsafe overheat protection: automatically cuts power to connected grow lights when room temperature exceeds set threshold. Adjustable delay timer prevents hot-restrike lamp damage. Max 16A/3600W; includes 2.5m NTC sensor. Manual reset required.

name: SMSCOM Smart NTC Sensor for Fan Controller
notes: 3m cable, NTC4K7 plug-and-play temperature sensor; converts Smart Controller MK2 into thermostatic fan controller. Also sold as NTC Temperaturfühler for Smart Controller MK2.

name: SMSCOM SPC Slave Mk2 16A
notes: Plug-and-play expansion module for SPC MK2 8A or 16A master; up to 5 slaves per master; includes link cable. Runs in automatic (slave) or manual 100% mode.

name: SMSCOM Twincontroller Pro Light Sensor
notes: Enables the PRO night-mode programme on Twincontroller Pro MK2; detects darkness and activates hourly humidity-purge cycle to prevent mould. Also listed as 1.6m cable version at some UK retailers.

name: SMSCOM Twincontroller Pro Slave MK2 7A
notes: Expansion slave module for Twincontroller Pro MK2 7A master; max 7A/1600W; includes 5m NTC sensor and spare fuse. Supports optional light sensor.

name: SMSCOM Temperature Sensor 5m
notes: Extended replacement NTC probe for Twincontroller MK2 and SPC controllers; standard included probe is 2m; 5m version allows placement further from controller.

name: Spider Farmer 10-Port GGS Pro Adapter
notes: RJ12 hub with 10 numbered ports; expands RJ12 connectivity for the GGS ecosystem (humidifiers, fans, sensors, etc.). Compatible with GGS Controller, AC5, AC10, Pro Controller, and S-Station. Includes 1x RJ12 cable. AUD $22.99; not found on Amazon.de. US product page returning 404 at time of research.

name: Spider Farmer GGS 3-in-1 Soil Sensor Pro (3pcs)
notes: Pack of 3 sensors; each measures soil moisture (VWC), EC, and temperature via stainless steel probes. RJ12-connected to GGS system. Supports drip irrigation scheduling. Up to 6 units can connect to one GGS system. US price $65.99.

name: Spider Farmer GGS 5-in-1 SensorPro Kit
notes: Includes 4-in-1 Temp/Humidity/PPFD/VPD sensor + separate CO2 sensor module, 2x RJ12 2.5m cables, 1x RJ12 0.25m cable, 2x RJ12 splitters, GGS Light Adapter, and PAR bracket. Upgrades or replaces the basic temp/humidity sensor included with GGS controllers. EU price approx €79.99-99.99.

name: Spider Farmer S-Station Wi-Fi & Bluetooth Smart Plug
notes: Single-outlet smart plug for single-device automation within the Spider Farmer GGS app ecosystem. EU version is 220-240V 16A/3680W (ASIN B0FP529RR2). Does NOT connect via RJ12 to GGS Controller/AC5/AC10 power strips; works as companion device in the same app. US version is 15A/1875W ($29.99).

name: TechGrow Datalogger DL-1
notes: Records CO2, temperature, RH, and relative light from connected TechGrow sensors; stores up to 45M measurements on included 8GB SD card; Windows software included; powered via controller; compatible with almost all TechGrow products; no longer listed on techgrow.nl (may be discontinued)

name: TechGrow S-2 CO2 Sensor (10,000ppm)
notes: Extended-range S-2 variant; CO2 range 0-10000ppm plus light detection; NDIR sensor

name: TechGrow S-2 CO2 Sensor (2000ppm) with ABC
notes: S-2 variant with Automatic Baseline Calibration (ABC) at 400ppm; range 0-2000ppm; NDIR

name: TechGrow S-2 CO2 Sensor (2000ppm)
notes: NDIR CO2 sensor, 30ppm accuracy, built-in light sensor for day/night auto-switching; includes 5m UTP cable; compatible with T-Nano, T-Micro, T-1 Pro

name: TechGrow S-4 CO2 Sensor (10,000ppm)
notes: Extended-range S-4; CO2 0-10000ppm plus temperature, RH, and light; NDIR

name: TechGrow S-4 CO2 Sensor (2000ppm) with ABC
notes: S-4 all-in-one sensor variant (CO2, Temp, RH, Light) with Automatic Baseline Calibration; range 0-2000ppm

name: TechGrow S-4 CO2 Sensor (2000ppm)
notes: All-in-one sensor: CO2 (0-2000ppm), temperature (-40 to 100°C), relative humidity (0-99%), and light; NDIR; includes UTP cable; compatible with most TechGrow controllers

name: TechGrow S-Eco CO2 Sensor (2000ppm)
notes: Budget CO2 sensor, range 0-2000ppm, NDIR, includes ABC auto-calibration, built-in light sensor; compatible with T-Nano, T-Micro, T-1 Pro; temporarily unavailable at EUGardencenter

name: TechGrow Sensor Cable (10m)
notes: UTP CAT-6 network cable to extend connection between TechGrow sensors and compatible controllers; SKU 12012; also listed on bol.com

name: TechGrow Sensor Cable (15m)
notes: UTP CAT-6 network cable to extend connection between TechGrow sensors and compatible controllers; SKU 12013

name: TechGrow Sensor Cable (5m)
notes: UTP CAT-6 network cable to extend connection between TechGrow sensors and compatible controllers; SKU 12011

name: TechGrow Temp/RH Sensor

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: any AC-powered solenoid valve CO2 regulator
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 level triggers (0-5000 ppm range); day/night scheduling; precision cycle; data logging
compatible_devices.notes: Outlet 1 dedicated to CO2 regulator; opens solenoid valve when CO2 drops below setpoint. Requires regulator that auto-activates when AC power is applied (typical solenoid design). Max 1100W combined. Night scheduling disables CO2 injection during dark period.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AC Infinity CO2 Regulator (with solenoid valve and flow meter)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 level triggers (0-5000 ppm); day/night scheduling; cycle; data logging
compatible_devices.notes: AC Infinity's own CO2 Regulator (solenoid valve + gas flow meter, brass construction) is the primary intended pairing device. Sold separately.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Titan Controls CO2 regulators (120V solenoid type)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 level triggers; scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Titan Controls cited as compatible by retailer source. Compatibility applies to any 120V auto-start solenoid CO2 regulator. Verify device auto-starts when AC power is applied before purchase.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: inline exhaust fans, duct fans
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 level triggers; alternates exhaust fan on when CO2 is excessive; day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Outlet 2 dedicated to exhaust fan; activates to purge CO2 or maintain CO2 setpoint. On/off only; no speed control. Fan must auto-start when powered. Controller alternates regulator and fan to maintain CO2 levels.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Honeywell HCM350, Aquaoasis Cool Mist, Ideal-Air 716-832
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temp/humidity/VPD-triggered on/off, scheduling, cycles, timers
compatible_devices.notes: Requires companion UIS controller (Controller 69, 69 Pro, 69 Pro+, or Controller AI+); on/off only; device must auto-start when powered; max 1800 W / 15 A; tested brands include Aquaoasis, Honeywell, Ideal-Air

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Frigidaire FFAD5033W1, GE APER14JBMW, De'Longhi DD45P
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Humidity-triggered on/off, scheduling, cycles, timers
compatible_devices.notes: Requires companion UIS controller; on/off only; device must auto-start when powered; tested brands include Frigidaire, GE, De'Longhi, Levoair, Yaufey, Britsou

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: iPower 1500W, Lasko 754200, Pelonis HB-211T
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temp-triggered on/off, scheduling, timers
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer advises against devices with continuous high-wattage loads; fan-type heaters that auto-start on plug-in only; requires UIS controller; tested brands include iPower, Lasko, Opolar, Pelonis

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Light cycle scheduling, timer-based on/off
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only — no dimming possible via Control Plug; light must auto-start when powered; requires UIS controller; for dimming use native UIS lighting adapters instead

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Light cycle scheduling, timer-based on/off
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only; ballast must auto-restart on power restore; watch 1800 W limit for high-wattage HID ballasts; requires UIS controller

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Scheduling, temp/humidity-triggered on/off, timer
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only — no speed control; device must auto-start when powered; requires UIS controller

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Scheduling, on/off cycle, timer
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only — no speed control; device must auto-start when powered; requires UIS controller

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Scheduling, cycle, timer

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Scheduling, cycle, timer

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Aprilaire 800, ultrasonic room humidifier

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CAP PPM-1, Blueprint BPCO2G, Titan Controls Ares 8
compatible_devices.notes: CO2/Night outlet activates when grow lights are ON and cooling outlet is NOT running (simple interlock logic via built-in photocell). No CO2 PPM sensor; no closed-loop PPM feedback. Suitable only for non-sealed rooms. CO2 automatically disabled when exhaust fan runs.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CO2 solenoid valve + regulator assembly, compressed CO2 tank system
compatible_devices.notes: Same CO2/Night outlet as co2_generator. Triggers solenoid valve on compressed CO2 systems when lights are on and cooling is off. No PPM feedback—interlock logic only. Dual-function outlet also serves as night device (activates during lights-off period).

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APC8400 Digital CO2 Controller with Integrated Sensor

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APC8400 Digital CO2 Controller with Integrated Sensor
compatible_devices.notes: In Vent/CO2 Decrease mode, Exhaust Fan socket (10A max) activates exhaust fan when PPM exceeds Set Target Hi; shuts off when PPM drops below Set Target Low. On/off switching only, no variable speed. Any 120V AC inline or exhaust fan up to 10A compatible. Photocell does not affect Vent mode output.

controller_model: Autopilot APCET 24hr Day & Night Cooling/Heating Thermostat

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APCET 24hr Day & Night Cooling/Heating Thermostat
compatible_devices.notes: Configured in cooling mode: switches 120V AC inline or exhaust fan on when temperature exceeds day or night setpoint; off when temperature drops back through the 3°F differential. On/off only, no variable speed. Also suitable for portable AC units and window ACs that auto-restart on power restoration. 120V/15A max, temperature range 45-95°F. US 120V only.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APCET 24hr Day & Night Cooling/Heating Thermostat
compatible_devices.notes: Configured in heating mode: switches 120V electric heater on when temperature falls below setpoint; off when temperature rises through the 3°F differential. Any 120V electric space heater or ceramic fan heater up to 15A compatible. On/off only. Temperature range 45-95°F. Separate day and night setpoints via analog knobs and built-in photocell.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APCET 24hr Day & Night Cooling/Heating Thermostat
compatible_devices.notes: Technically compatible: any 120V AC circulation fan can be switched on/off via the thermostat outlet. Use case is non-standard; circulation fans normally run continuously. Fan only operates when temperature exceeds (cooling mode) or falls below (heating mode) setpoint. Not designed for this application.

controller_model: Autopilot APCET2 Advanced Day & Night Cooling/Heating Thermostat

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APCET2 Advanced Day & Night Cooling/Heating Thermostat

Also suitable for portable AC units and window ACs that auto-restart. 120V/15A max, temperature range 50-100°F. Memory-lock prevents accidental setpoint changes. US 120V only.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APCET2 Advanced Day & Night Cooling/Heating Thermostat
compatible_devices.notes: Configured in heating mode: switches 120V electric heater on when temperature falls below setpoint. Any 120V electric space or fan heater up to 15A compatible. On/off only. Temperature range 50-100°F. Memory-lock feature distinguishes APCET2 from basic APCET; prevents knob from being accidentally knocked off setpoint.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APCET2 Advanced Day & Night Cooling/Heating Thermostat
compatible_devices.notes: Technically compatible: any 120V AC circulation fan can be switched on/off via the thermostat outlet. Use case is non-standard; circulation fans normally run continuously rather than on a temperature trigger. Memory-lock feature (vs. basic APCET) reduces risk of accidental setting drift.

compatible_devices.notes: Controls primary cooling fan and optionally a second cooling fan or air conditioning unit; on/off relay switching; any mains-powered fan or AC unit compatible via relay box

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Bluelab Power Relay R4 or any 24V DC coil relay/contactor
compatible_devices.notes: Explicitly supports fan-based fogger, ultrasonic humidifier, or nozzle-type fogger; activates when humidity drops below set point

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Bluelab Power Relay R4 or any 24V DC coil relay/contactor
compatible_devices.notes: Any mains dehumidifier compatible via relay box; activates when humidity exceeds set point; adjustable switching offsets to prevent rapid cycling

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Bluelab Power Relay R4 or any 24V DC coil relay/contactor
compatible_devices.notes: Controls CO2 solenoid valve on/off for regulator-based CO2 injection; built-in CO2 sensor (0-5000 ppm optional); light sensor prevents CO2 injection during dark periods; CO2 generator control also supported via relay

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Bluelab Power Relay R4 or any 24V DC coil relay/contactor
compatible_devices.notes: Any mains heater compatible via relay box; activates when temperature drops below set point; total mains current through each relay box must not exceed relay label rating

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Bluelab EnviroSensor
compatible_devices.notes: EnviroSensor monitors temperature, relative humidity, CO2 (0-5000 ppm, optional), and light level; also supports optional lamp over-temperature sensor and outside temperature probe; IntelliClimate kit includes EnviroSensor

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: PeriPod M3, PeriPod M4, PeriPod L3
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 8-part nutrient dosing plus pH up/down and water dilution; M3 = 120 ml/min, M4 = multi-channel, L3 = 1400 ml/min; 9 configurable outputs from firmware v3.03
Any chemically resistant 24V DC solenoid valve compatible; output voltage 12-24V AC or DC (typically 24V DC); max 1.2A inductive per output; alternative to PeriPod peristaltic pumps

Up to 4 irrigation pump station outputs configurable; mains-powered pumps (110/240V AC) require Bluelab Power Relay R4 (4-channel, 24V DC coil); controls NFT, DFT/DWC, drip, soil, aeroponic irrigation

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Bluelab pH Probe (5m), Bluelab Intelligent EC Probe, Bluelab Temperature Probe
compatible_devices.notes: Bundled Bluelab Conductivity Probe (DiPulse technology resists fouling) and pH Probe (5 m cable); temperature probe included; EC accuracy ±0.1, pH resolution 0.1

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Bluelab pH Probe
compatible_devices.notes: Identical pH dosing logic to the base Bluelab pH Controller. Adds Bluelab Connect Stick (USB dongle, sold separately) enabling PC data logging, remote settings adjustment, and high/low alarm notifications via the Bluelab Connect desktop and mobile app. Reservoir up to 200 US gal / 760 L.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: pH Probe, Temperature Probe
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Remote pH monitoring, automated dosing schedules, push alerts via Edenic app
compatible_devices.notes: Built-in peristaltic pump handles all pH dosing (acid/alkali, up to 120 ml/min); no external PeriPod or PowerPod compatibility; probes are field-replaceable; does not monitor EC

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Bluelab pH Probe
compatible_devices.notes: Double-junction waterproof pH probe connects via BNC. Controller automatically doses pH Up or pH Down via built-in peristaltic pump (10 ml/min). No data logging, no app, no remote monitoring. Single-direction dosing (user selects Up or Down mode). Control range 0.1-13.9 pH, 0.1 pH resolution.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: PeriPod M3, PeriPod M4, PeriPod L3
compatible_devices.notes: Same PeriPod compatibility as base Pro Controller; Connect version includes Bluelab Connect Stick for wireless data logging to Bluelab Connect desktop software; dosing data logged as CSV; M3/M4 cannot mix with L3
Identical PowerPod temperature control to base Pro Controller; temperature data logged by Connect software; PowerPod triggers heaters based on temperature setpoint from Pro Controller Connect
PowerPod switches mains-powered water chillers and cooling pumps based on temperature; Connect software logs temperature events

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro Controller pH Probe, Pro Controller Conductivity Probe, Temperature Probe
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: BNC (pH probe), proprietary (EC and temperature probes)
compatible_devices.notes: Includes Bluelab Connect Stick (USB) for wireless data logging of pH/EC/temperature to Connect desktop software; Connect Mobile app enables remote monitoring and alarm alerts; data exported as CSV; Connect Range Extender 2 available to extend wireless range

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: PeriPod M3, PeriPod M4, PeriPod L3
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Multi-part nutrient dosing; individual pump ratio control; remote dose scheduling and monitoring via Edenic app
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 3 PeriPods daisy-chained (up to 12 nutrient parts); M3/M4 cannot mix with L3; individual pump ratios configurable via Edenic; doses to 0.1 pH and 0.1 EC increments; succeeds original Pro Controller (CONTPRO)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature-triggered mains switching with remote monitoring and alerts via Edenic
compatible_devices.notes: PowerPod switches any mains heater on/off based on Pro Controller Wi-Fi temperature setpoints; 4 IEC outlets, 8.5A max total load; PowerPod is a separate purchase; do not confuse with Bluelab Power Relay R4 (that is for IntelliClimate/IntelliDose, not this controller)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature-triggered chiller/pump control with remote monitoring via Edenic
compatible_devices.notes: PowerPod switches mains-powered water chillers, coolers, and irrigation pumps based on temperature setpoint; temperature-based triggering only; up to 8.5A total load across 4 IEC outlets

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro Controller pH Probe, Pro Controller Conductivity Probe, Temperature Probe
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: BNC (pH probe), proprietary (EC and temperature probes)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Real-time pH/EC/temperature trending, remote push alerts, historical data via Edenic app
compatible_devices.notes: Three field-replaceable probes (pH BNC, EC proprietary, temp proprietary); 2m cables; all readings viewable and alerted remotely via Edenic; Sample Tube accessory available to mount probes in inline sample line rather than directly in reservoir

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: PeriPod M3, PeriPod M4, PeriPod L3
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 3 PeriPods daisy-chained for up to 12 nutrient parts; M3/M4 series cannot be mixed with L3 series; data cable (M12 8-pin to M12 8-pin, 1m) sold separately; doses to 0.1 pH and 0.1 EC increments
PowerPod switches any mains-powered heater on/off based on Pro Controller temperature setpoint; 4 IEC outlets, 8.5A total max load, 100-240V; available in EU, UK, US, AUS plug variants
PowerPod switches mains-powered water chillers, coolers, and circulation pumps based on temperature setpoint; temperature-based control only; any mains pump up to 8.5A total load

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro Controller pH Probe, Pro Controller Conductivity Probe, Temperature Probe
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: BNC (pH probe), proprietary (EC and temperature probes)
compatible_devices.notes: Three replaceable probes measure pH, EC/conductivity, and temperature; high/low alarms for all parameters; pH probe uses industry-standard BNC connector; 2m (6ft) probe cables; auto-resumes dosing after power loss

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK, S&P TD series, Vents TT series
compatible_devices.notes: CL-A series. Manual 5-position rotary switch (no automation). AC motor fans only; EC fans not compatible. Available in 5A, 7A, 11A, 13A variants. Emergency override button forces 100% fan speed if rotary switch fails. IP44 housing. 230×150×80mm panel-mount format.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CO2 cylinder solenoid valve, CO2 generator gas valve
compatible_devices.notes: Controls a CO2 gas supply solenoid valve (on/off only). Separate output from fan speed control. No CO2 concentration sensing or automatic dosing — purely manual on/off. Emergency override button forces 100% gas supply if switch fails. Suitable for manual CO2 cylinder release valve or generator gas feed. Not a dedicated CO2 controller.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RVK 125L A1, Prima Klima PK125AL, CAN Fan Q-Max 250
compatible_devices.notes: TRIAC-based stepless analog speed controller; 2 fan inlets on controller sides; available in 7A, 12A, 16A; temperature range 5-55°C; IP44; compatible with any single-phase 220/240V 50Hz AC motor inline/duct fan. Does NOT control lights, heaters, humidifiers, or CO2 equipment.

Any single-phase 220/240V AC circulation fan within amperage rating; fan must be rated for TRIAC voltage-reduction speed control (not all clip/oscillating fans tolerate TRIAC control). Always verify fan specs before connecting.

compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any single-phase AC inline or duct fan up to 4A
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK 100/125/150 A1, Prima Klima mixed-flow AC fans, BioGreen AC extraction fans
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: Schuko outlet (EU), external NTC temperature probe (5m cable)
compatible_devices.notes: Automatic 2-step speed control based on temperature via external probe (5m cable). AC series, 4A max, 220/240V 50Hz, IP44. Includes minimum-speed dimmer knob (low-speed baseline) and separate thermostat setpoint knob. NOT compatible with EC fans. Suitable for both supply (intake) and extraction fan applications. Higher-capacity variants available from Cli-Mate (7A, 12A, 24A Multi-Controller) for larger fans.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RVK 125L A1, Prima Klima PK125AL, CAN Fan Q-Max 250
compatible_devices.notes: Variable Frequency Drive (VFD) for single-phase AC induction motors; outputs 5-50 Hz variable frequency AC; available in 3A (660W), 7A (1500W), 15A (3300W); temperature range 5-55°C; IP44 (some listings show IP20/IP32 for older variant); eliminates motor humming/vibration without TRIAC artifacts. NOT compatible with true EC fans that use 0-10V or PWM speed signal inputs.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RVK 100L A1, RVK 125L A1, RVK 150L A1
compatible_devices.notes: RVK A1-series fans use single-phase AC external-rotor motors compatible with VFD frequency control. RVK L-series EC fans (with built-in 0-10V electronics) are NOT compatible with this frequency controller.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CAN Fan Q-Max 250/1020, CAN Fan Max-Fan 150/788
compatible_devices.notes: CAN Fan AC motor models confirmed compatible by UK retailer listing. Verify fan amperage does not exceed selected controller model rating (3A/7A/15A).

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Phresh 4 Inch Stealth Fan, Phresh 6 Inch Stealth Fan
compatible_devices.notes: Phresh AC-motor inline fans confirmed compatible by UK retailer. Phresh fans use single-phase AC motors suitable for VFD frequency control.

Manufacturer documentation mentions pumps and ventilators as compatible single-phase motor types; many AC circulation fans use single-phase induction motors and would be compatible, but not all clip/pedestal fans are rated for VFD speed control. Verify motor type before connecting.

On/off relay control via 230V socket output. Activates humidifier when RH drops below setpoint. Humicon-2020 series. Max 16A (~3680W). 5m humidity probe. RH range 0–99%. No fan speed control, purely on/off switching.

On/off relay control. Activates dehumidifier when RH exceeds setpoint. Manufacturer also states a heater can be connected in dehumidifier mode to lower RH via warming. Max 16A. Single 230V socket output shared between humidifier and dehumidifier mode (switch selects mode).

Heater can be connected in dehumidifier mode as an alternative dehumidification method (heat lowers relative humidity). Control is humidity-based on/off only, not temperature-based. Not intended as a primary heater controller.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RVK 100L A1, Prima Klima PK100AL, CAN Fan Q-Max 100
compatible_devices.notes: Copper coil (autotransformer/TRIAC hybrid) speed controller; eliminates motor humming; 5-speed temperature-based program; 2 fan inlets; available in 7A and 12A (Easy & Simple range overview lists 16A max); temperature range 11-45°C; IP44; compatible with any single-phase 220/240V AC motor inline/duct fan. Does NOT control lights, heaters, humidifiers, or CO2.
Copper coil technology suppresses noise making it well-suited for circulation fans where quiet operation matters; fan must be single-phase 220/240V AC within controller amperage rating.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RVK A1, Systemair RVK, RAM Fans, Ruck
compatible_devices.notes: Stepless analog (triac-based) speed control for intake and extractor AC fans simultaneously; speed adjustable via dials. 3A (MH-3) or 7A (MH-7) variant. Temperature and humidity both influence fan speed decisions. EC fans are not compatible.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Lumatek 600W, Gavita Pro 600, Sunmaster 600W
compatible_devices.notes: Timer-switched relay outlets; max 600W per socket. 2 or 4 sockets depending on model variant. Mechanical clock timer with 15-minute increments.
Timer on/off relay; max 600W per outlet. No dimming output (no 0-10V or PWM). LEDs can be timer-scheduled but no dimming control.
Temperature-triggered on/off relay; heater activates when temperature falls below set point. Max 3500W (16A). Any resistive heater with EU plug compatible.
Single socket switchable between humidifier OR dehumidifier mode; cannot run both simultaneously. Humidity-triggered on/off relay. Max 600W per outlet. Set target humidity with ±5% rH hysteresis.
Shares the single humidity socket with humidifier mode; must choose one mode via selector switch. Cannot control humidifier and dehumidifier simultaneously. Humidity-triggered on/off relay; max 600W.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RVK A1, Systemair RVK, RAM Fans, Ruck
compatible_devices.notes: Stepless analog (triac-based) speed control for both intake and extractor AC fans simultaneously. 3A model or 7A model depending on variant. Min/max speed adjustable via dials. EC fans incompatible with triac control.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Lumatek 600W, Gavita Pro 600, Sunmaster 600W
compatible_devices.notes: Timer relay on/off; max 600W per socket (2 or 4 sockets depending on model). Mechanical clock timer with 15-minute interval increments. Lumatek 600W Dimmer Kit explicitly referenced in compatibility by retailers.
Timer on/off relay only; max 600W per outlet. No dimming capability (no 0-10V or PWM output). LEDs can be scheduled but cannot be dimmed through this controller.
Temperature-triggered on/off relay; heater activates when temperature drops below set point. Max 3500W. Any resistive heater/radiator with EU plug compatible.
Built-in DC socket for small clip fans only. On/off operation; no speed control via this port. DC voltage and amperage not published by manufacturer. Only small clip fans confirmed compatible.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RVK 200L A1, Prima Klima PK200AL, CAN Fan Q-Max 400
compatible_devices.notes: TRIAC-based stepless analog speed controller with 4 fan inlets and 2 independent temperature-controlled zones; 2 external temperature sensors; available in 2x7A (14A), 2x12A (24A), 2x16A (32A); temperature range 5-55°C; IP44; intake and exhaust fans can be controlled independently. Does NOT control lights, heaters, humidifiers, or CO2.
Any single-phase 220/240V AC circulation fan within amperage rating per zone; same TRIAC cautions apply as for inline fans.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK Sileo, S&P TD series, Vents TT series
compatible_devices.notes: Temperature-triggered automatic 2-step fan speed control (minimum speed + full speed) via 3°C hysteresis. AC motor fans only; EC fans requiring 0-10V or PWM signal are NOT compatible. Max 6.5A (~1500W). 5m external temperature probe included. No automation beyond on/off speed step.

compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any single-phase AC inline or duct fan (TRIAC phase-cut compatible) up to 4A
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK 100/125/150 A1, Garden Highpro AC duct fans, BioGreen AC extraction fans
compatible_devices.notes: Manual stepless speed control via TRIAC phase-cut dimming; no thermostat or temperature automation. SPC series, 4A max, 220/230V 50Hz, IP20 (indoor only). NOT compatible with EC fans (which require 0-10V or PWM signal) or with brushless DC fans. AC induction and shaded-pole motors that support phase-cut speed control are required. Suitable for supply and extraction fan applications.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK Sileo, S&P TD series, Prima Klima AC series
compatible_devices.notes: Tempcon-2020 series. Stepless analog/triac-based fan speed control in 'fan' mode. Temperature range 10–60°C. Max 16A (~3680W). AC motor fans only; EC fans (0-10V/PWM) are not compatible. 5m external temperature probe. Digital display with memory retention.

On/off heater control in 'heater' mode. Activates heater when temperature drops below setpoint. Max 16A. Mode is selected via hardware switch — cannot simultaneously control fan and heater. Temperature range 10–60°C.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Lumatek 600W, Gavita Pro 600, Philips Son-T 600W
compatible_devices.notes: Timer-switched relay only (on/off); max 600W per lamp outlet. Available in 4×, 8×, or 12×600W variants. No temperature sensing or dimming. Suitable for any HID ballast within the 600W limit.

Basic timer on/off relay only; max 600W per outlet. No 0-10V or PWM dimming signal. Any LED driver up to 600W with standard EU plug is switchable, but dimming features of the LED fixture are not accessible.

Dedicated heater inlet up to 3500W; timer-controlled switching only. No thermostat function—heater is on/off per programmed timer schedule, not temperature. For temperature-triggered heater control use Mini Controller or higher.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RVK A1, Systemair RVK, RAM Fans, Ruck
compatible_devices.notes: Electronic stepless analog speed controller (triac-based) for both intake and extractor AC fans; 7A capacity. Speed regulated by temperature and humidity (vacuum 0-50%). Min/max speed adjustable with hysteresis up to 7°C. EC fans incompatible with analog triac control.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Lumatek 600W, Gavita Pro 600, Sunmaster 600W, Philips Son-T 600W
compatible_devices.notes: Mechanical clock timer relay; 4 lamp sockets, max 600W each. Photoperiod programmable in 15-minute increments. No dimming signal.
Timer on/off relay only; max 600W per outlet, 4 sockets. No 0-10V or PWM dimming output. LEDs can be photoperiod-scheduled but dimming features are inaccessible.
Temperature-triggered on/off relay; dedicated heating socket rated up to 2400W (some variant listings show 1600W at 7A). Heater activates when temperature falls below set threshold.

Dedicated humidifier socket, separate from dehumidifier socket. Humidity-triggered on/off relay with ±5% rH hysteresis. Allows simultaneous humidifier and dehumidifier control—key upgrade over Mini Controller Humi.

Dedicated dehumidifier socket, separate from humidifier socket (confirmed: humidifier 1600W/7A, dehumidifier 700W/3A per retailer specs). Humidity-triggered on/off relay. Can operate humidifier and dehumidifier independently and simultaneously.

Identical dual-channel fan control to the standard Twin Controller. Intake-fan minimum, maximum, and negative-pressure settings are independent from exhaust. AC voltage regulation — EC fans (0-10V/PWM) are not supported. Available in 4+4A or 12+12A versions.

One dedicated Schuko output socket switchable between humidifier and dehumidifier via a physical mode-selector switch — only one device type can be connected at a time. On/off switching based on RH setpoint; switching differential ±5% rH. Humidity range 20–100% rH. Amperage rating limited to the controller's total capacity (4A or 12A per side).

Same shared Schuko socket as the humidifier output — physical mode selector must be repositioned and device cable swapped to switch between humidifier and dehumidifier. Cannot run humidifier and dehumidifier simultaneously. Switching differential ±5% rH; humidity range 20–100% rH. Pure on/off control (no variable output).

Two independent 220/230V AC outlets: one for intake fan, one for exhaust fan. Speed regulated continuously and proportionally by temperature setpoint. Uses AC voltage regulation (phase-cutting); EC fans requiring 0-10V or PWM signals are not compatible. Available in 4+4A (8A total) and 12+12A (24A total). Temperature range 5–55 °C, IP44. Negative-pressure balance adjustable via minimum-speed knob.

compatible_devices.notes: 1 channel; up to 40 single bus or 500 repeater bus fixtures; output range 50-115% (boost mode); supports 400W-1000W ballasts; HPS and LEP e-series only; no fan or ECM control on EL1

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, sunrise/sunset ramping
compatible_devices.notes: LED adapter cable mandatory; dimming range 50-100% only (no 115% boost for LED); confirmed for 1700e, 900e, CT1930e; EL1 has no fan or ECM ports

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1000e DE, Pro 600e, DigiStar e-series

compatible_devices.notes: EL1 has 1 control channel; handles up to 40 single-bus or 500 repeater-bus fixtures without a booster. Plug-and-play: cables included with each e-series fixture. Dimming range 50–115% (watts or % display). Ballasts must be set to EXT (external control) mode. Also listed as compatible with Gavita LEP (Light Emitting Plasma) fixtures. Gen 2 uses 15V power supply (vs 5V on Gen 1). No ECM auxiliary output — that is EL2-only.

compatible_devices.notes: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter required for 900e, 1700e, and CT1930e LED fixtures; adapters use RJ45 connectors for daisy-chaining between fixtures. Adapter sold separately (HGC906717 or HGC906716). Up to 500 repeater-bus LED fixtures per channel with adapter. EL1 supports only 1 channel.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1000e DE, Pro 600e, Pro 1000e DE Flex
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: proprietary Gavita e-series bus (RJ 4P4C controller side / RJ 6P4C fixture side)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, auto-shutdown, sunrise/sunset ramping, PID temperature-based fan coordination
compatible_devices.notes: 1 channel; up to 40 single bus / 500 repeater bus fixtures; 50-115% output range; F variant adds integrated 0-10V EC fan control with PID algorithm for coordinated temperature management

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, sunrise/sunset ramping, PID fan-light coordination
compatible_devices.notes: LED adapter cable mandatory; dimming range 50-100% for LED; fan control (PID) integrates well with LED dimming for combined temperature management

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Gavita Vector EC fans
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: PID auto-tuning fan speed, temperature-based ramp, event logging of temperature extremes
compatible_devices.notes: 1 EC fan output; up to 2 fans connected; control range 10-100%; 0-10V signal via 4P4C RJ9 connector; Gavita Vector EC fans are the primary confirmed compatible brand; third-party 0-10V EC fans require wiring adapter to RJ9 and are not officially supported; FB1 Fan Balancer (sold separately) allows intake/exhaust offset

compatible_devices.notes: 2 independent channels; up to 80 single bus / 1000 repeater bus fixtures; expandable to 1200 with Gavita B200 booster; channels can run overlapping or alternating (flip-flop) 12/12 cycles; 2 independently programmable ECM outputs

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1700e LED, Pro 900e LED, CT1930e LED

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, sunrise/sunset ramping, independent light cycles per channel
compatible_devices.notes: LED adapter cable mandatory; dimming range 50-100% for LED; 2 channels allow independent LED control in two rooms; EL2 has 2 ECM outputs for auxiliary equipment

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1000e DE, Pro 600e, DigiStar e-series
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: dual-channel 24h timer with independent light cycles, independent sunrise/sunset per channel, auto-dim at temperature, emergency auto-shutdown, event logging
compatible_devices.notes: EL2 has 2 independent control channels; up to 80 single-bus or 1000 repeater-bus fixtures total (40/500 per channel). Supports dual-room 12/12 alternating light cycles. Dual 3.5mm jack temperature sensors (T1 + T2). Alarm contacts NO/NC. Expandable via Gavita Booster B200 to 1200 fixtures. Also compatible with Gavita LEP fixtures.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 900e LED, Pro 1700e LED, Pro CT1930e LED

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: dual-channel scheduling, independent sunrise/sunset per room, auto-dim at temperature, emergency auto-shutdown, event logging
compatible_devices.notes: Same E-Series LED Adapter requirement as EL1. EL2 adds a second independent LED channel enabling dual-room 12/12 scenarios with LED fixtures. Adapters sold separately (HGC906717 or HGC906716). RJ45 daisy-chain between fixtures.

ECM1 is an on/off switch (DPST, 15A AC3) that follows the EL2 light channel — user can set it to activate during lights-on or lights-off. Suitable for CO2 generators or solenoid valves on CO2 tanks. No CO2-level sensing; purely schedule-driven switching. ECM1 is EL2-exclusive and not compatible with EL1. Up to 2 ECMs connectable per EL2 controller.

ECM1 switches a dehumidifier on or off based on the lighting schedule (lights-on or lights-off phase). No RH sensing — purely schedule-based. 15A load capacity per ECM1. EL2-exclusive. Up to 2 ECMs per EL2.

ECM1 switches a heater on or off tied to the lighting schedule (typically lights-off phase for supplemental heat). No thermostat sensing for the heater — purely schedule-based switching. 15A load per ECM1. EL2-exclusive. Up to 2 ECMs per EL2.

ECM1 is a DPST relay module (15A, 120-240V) switched by the EL3 during lights-on or lights-off periods. On/off control only; no variable control. ECM1 available in EU, UK, US (120V/240V), AUS plug variants.
Gavita explicitly lists dehumidifiers as a supported device class for the ECM1. On/off relay control only; switched per lighting schedule.
CO2 equipment explicitly listed as supported by Gavita for use with ECM1. On/off relay switched per lighting schedule. No PPM feedback loop.
Heaters listed by Gavita as an ECM1 use case. On/off relay control per lighting schedule. Max 15A / 1800W at 120V or 3600W at 240V.
Watering/irrigation systems listed by Gavita as an ECM1 use case. On/off relay control switched per lighting schedule. No time- or volume-based irrigation logic beyond lights-on/lights-off.

Proprietary RS-485 features (status feedback, per-fixture monitoring via Gavita Master Controller EL3) are NOT available via 0-10V.
