An adapter cable is required to interface with the DimmerDirector 0-10V output. Daisy chain supports up to 50 fixtures (exceptions apply to first-gen SPYDR, max 10).

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Lumatek 600W Digital, Dimlux Expert 1000W
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, light intensity scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Only HID electronic ballasts with a 0-10V dimming input are compatible. Magnetic ballasts and non-dimmable electronic ballasts are NOT compatible. GrowDirector markets DimmerDirector as an LED controller; HID ballast compatibility is inferred from 0-10V protocol. Dimming range limited by ballast specifications.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule automation, climate trigger on/off, AI-driven environmental control
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only via relay contacts; no fan speed control. Relay rated 10A per channel, 0-250Vac. For high-current fans use an external contactor.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, climate trigger on/off
compatible_devices.notes: Relay can switch power on/off but cannot provide 0-10V speed control signal. EC fan speed control requires a separate 0-10V controller. Relay rated max 10A per channel.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, climate trigger on/off
compatible_devices.notes: On/off relay switching only. No speed control. Manufacturer lists fans as compatible device category.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, light cycle automation
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only; no dimming. For 0-10V dimming control use DimmerDirector instead. Manufacturer explicitly lists LED lights as compatible.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, light cycle automation, photoperiod management
compatible_devices.notes: Relay switching is the standard control method for HPS and CMH fixtures. Max 10A per channel; use an external contactor for high-wattage ballasts (e.g. 1000W HPS).

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, VPD/humidity trigger automation, AI climate optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer explicitly lists humidifiers as compatible. Works best with SensorDirector providing humidity/VPD feedback for automated triggers.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, VPD/humidity trigger automation, AI climate optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer explicitly lists dehumidifiers as compatible. Relay voltage supports 0-250Vac, 10A per channel.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, CO2 level trigger automation, AI climate control
compatible_devices.notes: Triggers CO2 generators and CO2 solenoid valves via relay. Manufacturer confirms CO2 system compatibility. Pair with SensorDirector CO2 sensor for feedback-based automation.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, temperature trigger automation, AI climate optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer lists heaters and chillers as compatible. Relay rated 10A/channel, 0-250Vac. Use external contactor for high-wattage heaters.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, sensor-triggered irrigation automation
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer explicitly lists irrigation pumps as compatible. Supports any pump controllable via relay on/off. Relay rated 10A per channel.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, EC/pH trigger dosing automation
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer explicitly lists dosing pumps as compatible. Used with nutrient/pH dosing systems. Pair with HydroDirector or SensorDirector EC/pH sensor for feedback-based dosing.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, soil-moisture trigger automation, AI irrigation optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Can trigger external irrigation controllers or solenoid valves via dry contact relay. Manufacturer confirms irrigation system integration. Pair with SensorDirector soil moisture sensor for feedback automation.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature/VPD schedule, climate rules
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching via 10 built-in relays or SocketDirector (2 AC sockets per module, 15A, 100-240V); variable speed control requires optional MotorSpeedDirector module; brand-agnostic

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD auto-tuning, fan speed schedule, ML climate optimization
compatible_devices.notes: DimmerDirector outputs 0-10V or 0-5V; compatible with any EC fan accepting 0-10V analog speed signal; AI/ML features via GrowDirector app

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: light schedule, intensity dimming, VPD-linked light control, ML light optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Dimming via DimmerDirector 0-10V or 0-5V output; monitors LUX/PAR via sensor; up to 200 LED drivers per module, up to 16,000 total daisy-chained; requires LED driver with 0-10V dimming input

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: schedule only
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only via relay or SocketDirector; no dimming capability for HID ballasts; schedule and timer control possible

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: humidity/VPD rules, schedule, closed-loop humidity control
compatible_devices.notes: On/off triggered by humidity or VPD sensor rules; compatible with any mains-powered humidifier or ultrasonic fogger; SocketDirector or DryContactDirector for integration

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: humidity/VPD rules, schedule
compatible_devices.notes: On/off triggered by humidity or VPD sensor rules; compatible with any mains-powered dehumidifier

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 rules, schedule, VPD-linked CO2
compatible_devices.notes: Controls CO2 generators and CO2 bottle solenoid valves via relay (DryContactDirector: 4 channels, 10A, 0-250Vac); closed-loop CO2 control requires CO2 sensor via SensorDirector module

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature rules, schedule
compatible_devices.notes: On/off control via relay or SocketDirector; compatible with any mains-powered heater or heat mat; temperature sensor required for closed-loop control

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: irrigation schedule, zone control, up to 10 zones
compatible_devices.notes: Standard water/irrigation pumps switched on/off via relay; chillers and compressors also supported; up to 10 irrigation zones documented

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: nutrient dosing rules, pH/EC-based automation
compatible_devices.notes: 3 built-in dosing pumps per HydroDirector module (up to 200 ml/min); external alternative dosing pumps also connectable (up to 200 l/min); integrated pH, EC, water temperature sensor ports

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: closed-loop pH correction, automated pH dosing
compatible_devices.notes: pH sensor port on HydroDirector; automated pH up/down adjustment via integrated dosing pump; pH sensor brand/type not specified in documentation

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: EC/nutrient concentration automation, closed-loop EC control
compatible_devices.notes: EC sensor port on HydroDirector; automated nutrient dosing based on EC readings; also supports DO and ORP sensors; brand not specified

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: schedule, temperature/VPD-linked on/off
compatible_devices.notes: On/off control via relay or SocketDirector; any mains-powered oscillating or clip fan compatible; no speed variation without additional MotorSpeedDirector module

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: full data logging, AI Agronomist plant diagnostics, ML climate optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Supports temperature, humidity, CO2, pH, EC, soil moisture, LUX, PAR, water tank level sensors; 4 sensor ports per SensorDirector module; expandable; GrowDirector proprietary sensor ecosystem

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: HydroDirector built-in dosing pumps (3x, 200 ml/min each)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI/ML-driven automated nutrient dosing, pH/EC correction scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: 3 dosing pumps built into the unit. Flow rate up to 200 ml/min each. Controlled via Wi-Fi through GrowDirector 3 PRO app with integrated ML software.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI/ML-driven automated nutrient dosing
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer states external dosing pumps can be connected up to 200 L/min flow rate. Specific connector type and compatible brands not disclosed. Contact GrowDirector for integration details.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: GrowDirector pH sensor
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Automated pH correction via dosing pump, ML-based alerts
compatible_devices.notes: Dedicated pH sensor port (1 of 3 sensor ports). Closed-loop pH dosing automated via app. GrowDirector-branded sensor required — no third-party probe compatibility confirmed.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: GrowDirector EC & Water Temperature sensor
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Automated EC correction via dosing pump, ML-based alerts
compatible_devices.notes: Combined EC + water temperature sensor. Closed-loop EC management via nutrient dosing pumps. GrowDirector ecosystem sensor only.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: GrowDirector DO/ORP sensor, GrowDirector EC & Water Temp sensor
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Real-time water quality monitoring with ML-based anomaly alerts
compatible_devices.notes: 3 sensor ports: pH, EC+water temp, DO/ORP. All sensors are GrowDirector proprietary. Industrial-grade electrode cables (~3 m). No third-party sensor compatibility confirmed.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule-based irrigation automation via app
compatible_devices.notes: HydroDirector integrates with broader GrowDirector 3 PRO ecosystem. Irrigation/drip lines controlled via DryContactDirector module alongside HydroDirector for full fertigation automation.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: GrowDirector Air Temperature, Humidity & VPD Sensor
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD monitoring, AI climate analytics, remote alerts, automated climate triggers
compatible_devices.notes: GrowDirector proprietary sensor. Temperature range: -40 to +80°C; Humidity: 0-100% RH; Accuracy: ±0.3°C, ±2% RH. 4 sensor ports per SensorDirector module. Third-party sensor compatibility not documented.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: GrowDirector CO2 Sensor
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 level monitoring, AI CO2 automation triggers, remote alerts
compatible_devices.notes: GrowDirector proprietary CO2 sensor sold separately. Enables automated CO2 triggers via DryContactDirector or SocketDirector. Each SensorDirector module accepts up to 4 sensors total.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, climate trigger on/off, AI environmental automation
compatible_devices.notes: On/off power switching only; no speed control. Available socket variants: Type F (Schuko/Europe), Type B (US), Type E (FR/BE), Type G (UK) on request. 2 individually switched sockets per unit, 100-240V, max 13-16A total.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, on/off climate automation
compatible_devices.notes: Power on/off via socket only; no 0-10V speed control. EC fan speed control requires a separate 0-10V signal controller.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, climate trigger on/off
compatible_devices.notes: On/off socket switching only. Works with any AC circulation fan with a compatible plug.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, light cycle automation
compatible_devices.notes: On/off power switching only; no dimming. For 0-10V dimming use DimmerDirector. Manufacturer lists LED lights as compatible device type.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, light cycle automation, photoperiod management
compatible_devices.notes: Power switching is the standard control method for HPS and CMH ballasts. Max 13-16A total per SocketDirector unit across both sockets. For high-draw ballasts check combined amperage.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, VPD/humidity trigger automation, AI climate optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer lists humidifiers as compatible. Any humidifier with a compatible AC plug works. Combine with SensorDirector humidity/VPD sensor for closed-loop control.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, VPD/humidity trigger automation, AI climate optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer lists dehumidifiers as compatible. Combine with SensorDirector humidity sensor for closed-loop dehumidification automation.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, CO2 level trigger automation
compatible_devices.notes: On/off power switching for CO2 generators. Manufacturer confirms CO2 system compatibility. Pair with SensorDirector CO2 sensor for level-based automation.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, temperature trigger automation, AI climate optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer lists heaters as compatible. Any plug-in heater within 13-16A limit. Combine with SensorDirector temperature sensor for closed-loop temperature control.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, sensor-triggered irrigation automation
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer lists irrigation pumps as compatible. Works with any pump that has a standard AC plug.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, EC/pH trigger dosing automation
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer lists dosing pumps as compatible. Any AC-powered dosing pump with standard plug supported.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CO2 compressed gas bottle with solenoid valve (included), generic CO2 pressure regulator + solenoid
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: proprietary solenoid valve output (valve included in box)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 PPM-based day/night control; active CO2 during lights-on only; increased ventilation when CO2 accumulates excessively
compatible_devices.notes: Delivers CO2 from a compressed gas bottle via included solenoid valve and pressure gauge. Not compatible with propane/LP CO2 burner-type generators. CO2 is controlled by CO2-PPM setpoint during daytime; controller shuts CO2 off at night. Multi-language menu (DE/EN/FR/ES/NL). 230V/50Hz, IP44.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature/humidity/CO2-based speed control; min/max fan speed limits; day and night modes; automatic boost ventilation when too hot or humid
compatible_devices.notes: TRIAC 2x16A output (2x600W) controls one intake and one exhaust AC fan independently. Fan speed responds dynamically to temperature, humidity and CO2 PPM. Separate min/max speed settings for day and night. EC/brushless fans are NOT compatible with TRIAC output.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Humidity setpoint control integrated with CO2/temperature logic; separate day and night setpoints
compatible_devices.notes: Dedicated humidifier outlet (on/off, 230V mains socket) among the multi-function outputs of the CO2 controller. Humidity control is integrated into the same controller logic as CO2 and temperature management. Any mains-powered humidifier up to rated amperage is compatible.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature-based on/off control; dedicated night-time heating logic
compatible_devices.notes: Dedicated heater outlet (on/off, 230V mains socket). Heater activates during night cycle when temperature falls below setpoint. Any mains-powered space heater or tube heater within rated amperage is compatible. Combined with fan-speed logic for integrated climate management.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Prima Klima 125L AC, Vents TT 150, Rhino Pro 150
compatible_devices.notes: TRIAC phase-cut speed control; 2 Schuko outlets (exhaust + intake); modulates fan speeds based on temperature (20-30 °C), humidity (30-100 % RH) AND negative pressure (50-100 %); combined temp+humidity 4 m digital probe (±0.5 °C / ±4.5 % RH); IP54; humidity control is indirect via fan speed adjustment only — no dedicated humidifier outlet; for direct humidifier switching a separate GSE Humidifier/Dehumidifier Controller is required; model variant 2LHY; NOT compatible with EC fans; NOT compatible with Soler & Palau Silent TD series

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Prima Klima 125L AC, Vents TT 125, Wallair N-60
compatible_devices.notes: TRIAC phase-cut speed control via 1 Schuko outlet; temperature-dependent speed modulation 20-100%; adjustable minimum speed (off, 20-100%); temperature setpoint 20-30 °C; 4 m digital temp probe (extendable to 50 m); IP54; model variants: 1A/200W, 2.5A/600W, 8A/1840W; NOT compatible with EC fans (no 0-10 V or PWM output); NOT compatible with Soler & Palau Silent TD series (requires dedicated step transformer); single fan output only

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Prima Klima 125L AC, Vents TT 150, Rhino Pro 125
compatible_devices.notes: TRIAC phase-cut speed control; 2 independent Schuko outlets (left = exhaust fan, right = intake fan); regulates speed based on temperature AND negative pressure (vacuum); negative pressure setpoint adjustable 50-100%; minimum fan speed adjustable 20-100%; temperature setpoint 20-30 °C; 4 m digital temp probe; IP54; model variants: 2x1A, 2x3A, 2x5A, 2x10A; can operate with single exhaust fan if intake air is passive; NOT compatible with EC fans; NOT compatible with Soler & Palau Silent TD series

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: day/night scheduling, temperature auto-control, humidity auto-control
compatible_devices.notes: 2 variable Schuko outlets using transistor phase control for intake and exhaust AC fans; max 2200W per outlet; total max load 3600W/16A across all 4 sockets; 230V/50Hz input

Internally carries two 0-10V outputs parallel to the phase-control AC fan outputs; intended to allow EC fans to track the same speed reference; exact external connector/terminal type not confirmed in available documentation

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: timer scheduling, day/night on/off
compatible_devices.notes: 2 programmable Schuko sockets described by retailer as 'ideal for lighting'; on/off only via timer or temp/humidity sensor trigger; no dimming or 0-10V light control; max 2200W per socket

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: timer scheduling, day/night on/off
compatible_devices.notes: Programmable Schuko sockets support timer and sensor-triggered on/off for LED lights; no 0-10V or PWM dimming; max 2200W per socket; day/night scheduling supported

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: humidity sensor auto-trigger
compatible_devices.notes: Programmable sockets assignable to humidity sensor; controller activates/deactivates socket when humidity falls below setpoint; on/off only; max 2200W

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: humidity sensor auto-trigger
compatible_devices.notes: Programmable sockets can be assigned to humidity sensor to activate dehumidifier when humidity exceeds setpoint; on/off only; max 2200W

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature sensor auto-trigger
compatible_devices.notes: Programmable sockets assignable to temperature sensor; heater activated when temp falls below setpoint; on/off only; max 2200W per socket; separate from the fan speed outputs
Programmable sockets support timer-based on/off; can switch a CO2 generator by timer; no CO2 sensor input on controller; no feedback loop; basic scheduling only

controller_model: GSE GSE EC Fan Controller LCD

compatible_devices.controller_model: GSE GSE EC Fan Controller LCD
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: day/night speed scheduling, temp/humidity auto-control, negative pressure monitoring, RPM readback
compatible_devices.notes: EC-only controller; no AC Schuko outlets; controls up to 2 EC fans via 4-pole 3.5mm jack; 2x 4m fan cables included; 0-10V or PWM selectable; 12VDC powered

compatible_devices.controller_model: GSE GSE EC Fan Controller LCD
compatible_devices.notes: Systemair Revolution EC fans use their own proprietary cable; active male-to-male EC cable bridges to 3.5mm jack; compatibility reported in grow community; verify with current Systemair documentation

compatible_devices.controller_model: GSE GSE EC Fan Controller LCD
compatible_devices.notes: Prima Klima EC fans use RJ45 natively; adapter cable required to bridge to 3.5mm jack; Prima Klima extractors have been paired with GSE controllers in product bundles

controller_model: GSE GSE Fan Controller AC-EC LCD

compatible_devices.controller_model: GSE GSE Fan Controller AC-EC LCD
compatible_devices.notes: Two dedicated 5A/230V Schuko outlets for inlet and exhaust fans; speed-controlled via triac phase control; max ~1150W per outlet; outlets are fan-only, not general-purpose programmable sockets

compatible_devices.controller_model: GSE GSE Fan Controller AC-EC LCD
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: day/night speed scheduling, temp/humidity auto-control, negative pressure monitoring
compatible_devices.notes: Two RJ45 outputs; user-selectable 0-10V or PWM signal per port; controls EC fans with RPM readback; operates independently from the AC Schuko outlets

compatible_devices.controller_model: GSE GSE Fan Controller AC-EC LCD
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: CAN Fan brand-specific EC adapter cable
compatible_devices.notes: Brand-specific EC adapter cables are listed as available accessories for CAN Fan; native connector on CAN Fan EC units differs from RJ45

compatible_devices.controller_model: GSE GSE Fan Controller AC-EC LCD
compatible_devices.notes: Prima Klima EC fans use RJ45 natively but with a different pinout/protocol; adapter cable confirmed available; Prima Klima fans bundled with GSE controllers documented

compatible_devices.controller_model: GSE GSE Fan Controller AC-EC LCD
compatible_devices.notes: EC adapter cable listed for Carbon Active brand; native connector differs from RJ45 port on controller

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: 600W magnetic ballast, 600W HPS
compatible_devices.notes: Controls up to 9×600W HID magnetic ballasts via 4×16A relay outputs and a 24h timer with 36h power reserve (30-min intervals); 3-phase CEE16 input at 230V/50Hz; all sockets are Schuko with flap-lid safety covers

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK, TT Fans AC series
compatible_devices.notes: Integrated GSE digital fan controller provides AC phase speed control for temperature and negative-pressure regulation; AC fans only — EC fans are not supported by this controller module; single exhaust fan channel
Watering/irrigation pump controlled via built-in digital impulse timer (230V 50Hz, 10A breaking capacity); basic cyclic on/off only, no EC or variable-speed pump control

Step-down transformer with 6 automatic voltage steps; temperature and humidity driven; specifically for AC induction motor fans; silent operation without hum at low speeds; NOT compatible with EC fans; available in 2.5A (1-fan) and 8A (2-fan) variants; IP54 rated

On/off hygrostat switching via integrated mains socket (230V/50Hz). 10A model rated to 2300W; 15A model also available. Any mains-powered humidifier or fogger within amperage limit is compatible. Two separate sockets: one for humidifier, one for dehumidifier. Hysteresis adjustable +1% to +10%. Sensor cable 4m.

On/off hygrostat switching via dedicated mains socket (230V/50Hz). 10A/15A rated. Any mains-powered dehumidifier within amperage limit is compatible. Hysteresis adjustable -1% to -10% for dehumidifier mode. Operates simultaneously with humidifier socket via two potentiometers. IP54 housing.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Lumatek 600W magnetic, Gavita 1000W DE, Dimlux Expert 1000W
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: schedule, timer, day/night cycle, sunrise/sunset simulation
compatible_devices.notes: 4 yellow relay sockets dedicated to high-inductive magnetic ballasts (up to 3600W per socket); 4 blue relay sockets for electronic ballasts, heaters, humidifiers etc; full schedule control via web browser software (Firefox/Chrome on Windows)

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Lumatek ATS 600W, Dimlux Expert Series, Gavita Pro 1000W DE
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: dimming schedule, day/night intensity, sunrise/sunset simulation
compatible_devices.notes: Optional SGC 0-10V/PWM output module required; connects to digital dimmable ballasts via terminal block; RJ45 and 3.5mm stereo jack also available on the module for compatible brands

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Mars Hydro FC-E series, Spider Farmer SF series
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: schedule, timer, day/night cycle
compatible_devices.notes: On/off scheduling via relay sockets only; dimming (0-10V) requires the optional SGC 0-10V/PWM output module; suitable for any LED fixture within the 3600W per socket rating

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Mars Hydro FC-E, Spider Farmer SE series, Lumatek ATS LED
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: dimming schedule, day/night intensity control
compatible_devices.notes: Requires optional SGC 0-10V/PWM output module; any LED fixture with a 0-10V dimming input can be connected via the terminal block output; specific LED brands not listed by manufacturer

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK, TT Fans, Prima Klima AC series
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature-based speed control, day/night schedule, negative pressure management
compatible_devices.notes: 2 dedicated variable AC-fan sockets with 0–100% phase-controlled modulation; max 2×1150W (2×5A); supports intake and exhaust fan simultaneously

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature-based EC fan speed control
compatible_devices.notes: Primaklima EC fans explicitly listed as compatible via the RJ45 connector on the SGC 0-10V/PWM output module; module also reads RPM feedback

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature-based EC fan speed control
compatible_devices.notes: Can-Fan EC fans explicitly listed as compatible via the 3.5mm stereo jack connector on the SGC 0-10V/PWM output module

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair e-K series, Soler & Palau TD EC
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature-based EC fan speed control
compatible_devices.notes: Any EC fan with a 0-10V control input can be wired via the terminal block (industrial hard wiring); requires the optional SGC 0-10V/PWM output module (€69); PWM output also supported

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: humidity-triggered on/off scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer explicitly lists humidifier as compatible device on blue relay sockets; on/off relay control only (no analogue output for variable-speed ultrasonic units); humidity triggered via included sensor

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: humidity-triggered on/off scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer explicitly lists dehumidifier as compatible device on blue relay sockets; on/off relay control only; humidity threshold set via included sensor

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature-triggered on/off scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer explicitly lists heater as compatible device on blue relay sockets; on/off relay control only; temperature threshold set via included sensor

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: timer-based on/off scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: CO2 generators or solenoid valves can be connected to blue relay sockets for timed on/off triggering; no native CO2 ppm sensor is included — closed-loop CO2 control requires a separate CO2 monitor/controller

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: HPS 600W, Metal Halide 400W/600W, CDM/CMH 315W
compatible_devices.notes: Primary designed use case. Contactor-based switching accommodates high inrush currents of HPS/MH ballasts. Models range from 4x600W to 12x600W (Timer Box I through III) and 8x600W (Timer Box IV). Uses Grasslin mechanical timer with 36h battery backup. Any brand HPS or MH ballast with standard Schuko plug is compatible.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: Schuko outlet (230V mains); 0-10V or PWM (Timer Box IV only)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Timer Box IV: temperature-triggered dimming, sunrise/sunset simulation via 0-10V or PWM output
compatible_devices.notes: Timer Box I/II/III: on/off scheduling via Schuko sockets only, no dimming. Timer Box IV adds a 0-10V or PWM dimming output for compatible LED drivers; dims lamps when temperature rises and enables sunrise/sunset profiles. Only LEDs with 0-10V or PWM dimming input benefit from the dimming feature on Timer Box IV.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: Schuko outlet (230V mains, inverted timer output)
compatible_devices.notes: Dedicated heating socket on Timer Box II, III, IV models (max 2400W). Activates automatically when grow lights switch off — purely time-inverted, no temperature sensor input. Provides basic dark-period heating but does not regulate to a target temperature. Any mains heater up to 2400W is compatible.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Ebb & Flow submersible pump, drip irrigation pump, NFT pump
compatible_devices.notes: Controls any mains-powered irrigation or recirculation pump up to 10A (2300W) via on/off switching. Separate irrigation interval (1–16h) and duration (1s–20min) for day and night cycles. Day/night detection via integrated 4m light sensor cable. IP54 housing. Suitable for Ebb & Flow, drip, NFT, and aeroponic systems. No temperature or EC/pH input — pure timer function.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Titan Controls Ares 2 CO2 generator, CO2 tank with AC solenoid regulator, natural gas CO2 burners
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: programmable CO2 setpoint (PPM), high/low CO2 concentration alarm, CO2 sensor calibration
compatible_devices.notes: WORK1 relay activates CO2 source when measured CO2 drops below setpoint minus hysteresis; compatible with any AC-powered CO2 generator or tank solenoid; includes NDIR S01 sensor (120s response time); available in US/EU/UK/AU plug versions

WORK2 relay activates exhaust fan when CO2 rises above setpoint plus hysteresis to vent excess CO2; on/off control only, no speed modulation; any AC-powered inline or exhaust fan up to 10A; no connectivity, standalone unit

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CO2 propane/natural gas generators, AC solenoid CO2 tank regulators, compressed CO2 systems
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: photo sensor day/night CO2 automation, plant mode / human mode selection, advanced repeating cycle timer
compatible_devices.notes: CO2 outlet activates CO2 source based on NDIR PPM measurement (±50ppm+5%, 1s sampling); photo sensor in S01 unit auto-disables CO2 at lights-off to prevent waste; ANSI/ASHRAE 62.1-2022+Addendum ab certified; power-loss memory; no WiFi/app

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: photo sensor day/night automation, plant mode with fan vs. plant mode without fan
compatible_devices.notes: FAN outlet activates exhaust fan to purge CO2 when above setpoint; operating mode can be set to plant mode without fan if no exhaust is available; photo sensor can suppress fan at night; on/off only, no speed modulation

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AC Infinity CLOUDMIST 1, Levoit Classic 300S, ultrasonic humidifier with manual on switch
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: high/low humidity alarm, remote monitoring and adjustment via app, humidity history graph
compatible_devices.notes: Identical hardware function to IHC-200 plus 2.4GHz WiFi (no 5GHz support). Humidifier on WORK1 outlet. INKBIRD app enables remote setpoint changes, alarm acknowledgment, and humidity log. Device must auto-restart when AC power is restored. EU version has Schuko outlets.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Tosot 30-pint dehumidifier, hOmeLabs 35-pint dehumidifier, portable electric dehumidifier
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: high/low humidity alarm, remote monitoring and adjustment via app, humidity history graph
compatible_devices.notes: Dehumidifier on WORK2 outlet. WiFi 2.4GHz only. INKBIRD app enables remote setpoint changes and alarm management. Device must auto-restart when AC power is restored. EU version has Schuko outlets.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: simple AC inline fan (non-EC), AC exhaust fan, AC box fan
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: high/low humidity alarm, remote monitoring via app
compatible_devices.notes: AC fan on WORK2 outlet as humidity-triggered exhaust. On/off only — no speed control. WiFi enables remote setpoint adjustment. Only simple AC fans (non-EC, non-PWM) suitable. Fan must auto-restart when power is restored.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AC clip-on oscillating fan, AC wall-mount circulation fan
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: high/low humidity alarm, remote monitoring via app
compatible_devices.notes: Simple AC circulation fans can be plugged into either outlet for humidity-triggered on/off control. Fixed speed only. EC/PWM fans not supported. Fan must auto-restart when power is restored. WiFi enables remote setpoint changes via INKBIRD app.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AC Infinity CLOUDMIST 1, Levoit Classic 300S, ultrasonic humidifier with manual on switch
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: high/low humidity alarm
compatible_devices.notes: Humidifier plugged into WORK1 outlet. Controller switches humidifier ON when RH drops below setpoint. CRITICAL: humidifier must resume operation automatically when AC power is restored (no auto-off digital panel that requires button press after power cycle). Max load 10A / 100-240V AC. EU version has Schuko outlets.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Tosot 30-pint dehumidifier, hOmeLabs 35-pint dehumidifier, portable electric dehumidifier
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: high/low humidity alarm
compatible_devices.notes: Dehumidifier plugged into WORK2 outlet. Controller switches dehumidifier ON when RH exceeds setpoint. Device must auto-restart when AC power is restored. Max load 10A / 100-240V AC. Dual-stage operation: both outlets can be active independently.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: simple AC inline fan (non-EC), AC exhaust fan, AC box fan
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: high/low humidity alarm
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer explicitly states the controller can control any 100-265V fan. Fan connected to WORK2 outlet acts as humidity-triggered exhaust (turns ON when RH exceeds setpoint). On/off only — no speed control. Only simple AC fans without digital control panels are suitable. EC fans and PWM fans are not controllable this way.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AC clip-on oscillating fan, AC wall-mount circulation fan
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: high/low humidity alarm
compatible_devices.notes: Simple AC circulation fans can be plugged into either outlet for humidity-triggered on/off control. Fan runs at fixed speed only. Useful as an air-exchange trigger when humidity rises. EC/PWM fans not supported. Fan must auto-restart when power is restored.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Rain Bird 24VAC solenoid valves, Hunter PGV-100G, Orbit 57860 24VAC solenoid
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: seasonal adjustment (-90% to +100%), rain skip, 3-month schedule planning, 6-month watering history, OTA firmware updates, Alexa and Google Assistant voice control
compatible_devices.notes: Controls 4 independent zones of standard AC24V solenoid irrigation valves; 6 programmable start times per zone; 2.4GHz WiFi only (no 5GHz); suitable for grow-room automated drip or flood irrigation if standard 24VAC solenoid valves are used; not suitable for DC-powered valves or EC fertigation dosing

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: scheduled pump activation via zone program, Alexa and Google Assistant voice trigger
compatible_devices.notes: M terminal outputs AC24V to trigger an external pump start relay; pump MUST NOT be wired directly to the controller or controller will be damaged; useful for grow room irrigation pump in automated fertigation setups; relay specifications not published in manual

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Rain Bird 100-DVF, Hunter PGV-101, Orbit 57461
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: 24VAC terminals (zones 1-6 + common C + master valve M port)
compatible_devices.notes: Controls up to 6 independent 24VAC solenoid irrigation zone valves plus optional master valve. Works with any standard 24VAC solenoid valve. Intended for garden/outdoor sprinkler or drip fertigation systems, NOT grow-room environment control. Can be paired via Tuya local protocol with Smart Life app or Home Assistant custom integration.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: 24VAC terminals (shared with master valve port M)
compatible_devices.notes: Controller provides 24VAC trigger signal only and does NOT supply main power to the pump. An external pump start relay is mandatory to switch line voltage to the actual pump motor. Connection method identical to master valve wiring.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Rain Bird WR2, Hunter Mini-Clik, Orbit 57069
compatible_devices.notes: Supports 1 rain sensor only. Obey/ignore sensitivity configurable per zone via app. Rain sensor causes controller to skip scheduled watering cycles when rain is detected. Sensor not included.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Rain Bird 100-DVF, Hunter PGV-101, Orbit 57461
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: 24VAC terminals (zones 1-8 + common C + master valve/pump M port)
compatible_devices.notes: Controls up to 8 independent 24VAC solenoid irrigation zone valves plus optional master valve via shared M port. Works with any standard 24VAC solenoid. 8-zone variant of IIC-600-WIFI. LCD with backlight. Super-capacitor maintains settings for 10-15 days during power outage. Tuya-based platform; also workable via Smart Life app or custom Home Assistant integration.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: 24VAC terminals (port M, shared with master valve)
compatible_devices.notes: Port M can drive either a master valve OR a pump start relay, not both simultaneously. Controller provides 24VAC trigger signal only; pump start relay required to switch line voltage to actual pump motor. Pump not included.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Rain Bird WR2, Hunter Mini-Clik, Orbit 57069
compatible_devices.notes: Supports up to 2 independent rain sensors (S1 and S2). Obey/ignore configurable per zone for each sensor individually. Jumpers on S1/S2 terminals must be removed before connecting sensors. Sensors not included.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Inkbird INK-HM20W heat mat, ceramic space heater, fan heater (Heizlüfter)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: day/night temperature schedule (two setpoints in 24h), high/low temp alarm, remote monitoring and adjustment via app, temperature history graph
compatible_devices.notes: Heating mode ONLY — no cooling function. Identical hardware function to ITC-306T plus 2.4GHz WiFi (no 5GHz support). Both outlets are heating-only relays. Max load 10A / 100-240V AC. EU version has Schuko outlets. Device must have simple mechanical on/off switch.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Inkbird INK-HM20W heat mat, ceramic space heater, fan heater (Heizlüfter)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: day/night temperature schedule (two setpoints in 24h), high/low temp alarm
compatible_devices.notes: Heating mode ONLY — no cooling function. Both outlets (WORK1, WORK2) are heating-only relays. Max load 10A / 100-240V AC (≈2300W at 230V). Device connected must have a simple mechanical on/off switch and must not auto-power-off when AC is cycled. EU version ships with Schuko plug and outlets.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any AC space heater, heat mat, seedling heat mat
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Remote temperature monitoring, historical temp trend chart, high/low temp alarms via app; Google Home and Amazon Alexa voice control
compatible_devices.notes: Identical heating outlet function to ITC-308. Adds WiFi remote monitoring and control via InkbirdSmart app (2.4 GHz only). Supports Google Home and Alexa for voice control. Max 10 A (1100 W @ 110 V / 2200 W @ 240 V).

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any single-speed AC inline fan, AC exhaust fan
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Remote set-point adjustment, temperature trend logging, high/low alarms; Google Home and Alexa
compatible_devices.notes: Cooling outlet activates fan when temperature exceeds cooling set point. On/off relay; no speed control. Remote set-point changes possible via InkbirdSmart app. 2.4 GHz WiFi only.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: Dehumidifier plugged into cooling outlet; activated on temperature rise. Temperature-based control only, no RH sensing. Remote monitoring possible via InkbirdSmart app.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: Humidifier can be temperature-triggered via either outlet. Non-standard use; no RH sensing. A dedicated humidity controller (e.g. Inkbird IHC-200) is recommended alongside for proper RH management.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: AC circulation fans can be temperature-triggered via cooling outlet. On/off only, no speed control. Remote set-point adjustable via app.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any AC space heater, heat mat, seedling heat mat
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: Heating outlet activates when measured temperature drops below the heating set point. On/off relay control. Max 10 A (1100 W at 110 V / 2200 W at 240 V). Primary intended use. Fixed NTC probe, not replaceable.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any single-speed AC inline fan, AC exhaust fan
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: Cooling outlet activates when measured temperature rises above the cooling set point. On/off relay; no speed control. Suitable for single-speed AC fans (inline, exhaust, intake). EC or PWM fans require separate speed controller — the ITC-308 handles on/off only.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: Dehumidifier can be plugged into the cooling outlet and activated when temperature rises above set point. Control is temperature-based, not humidity-based. Useful as a workaround but a dedicated humidity controller is recommended for proper RH management.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: Humidifier can be plugged into either outlet and activated based on temperature thresholds; not a standard use case. Humidity control requires a dedicated humidity controller. The ITC-308 does not read RH.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: AC circulation fans can be plugged into the cooling outlet and temperature-triggered. On/off only; no speed control. Using circulation fans purely for temperature mitigation is a non-standard but functional setup.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any AC space heater, heat mat, seedling heat mat
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: Functionally identical to ITC-308 for heating. Key hardware difference: NTC probe is plug-in and user-replaceable (phone-jack connector), unlike the fixed probe of the ITC-308. No WiFi. Max 10 A (1100 W @ 110 V / 2200 W @ 240 V).

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any single-speed AC inline fan, AC exhaust fan
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: Cooling outlet activates fan when temperature exceeds cooling set point. On/off relay; no speed control. Replaceable probe is advantageous in wet grow environments. No WiFi.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: Dehumidifier plugged into cooling outlet; activated on temperature rise only. No RH sensing. Replaceable probe suited for aquarium or humid grow environments. No WiFi.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: Humidifier can be temperature-triggered through either outlet. Non-standard use; no RH sensing. Replaceable probe is advantageous in high-humidity environments. No WiFi.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (Schuko CEE 7/4 EU / NEMA 5-15 US, region-specific)
compatible_devices.notes: AC circulation fans can be temperature-triggered via cooling outlet. On/off only, no speed control. Replaceable probe suited for humid grow rooms. No WiFi.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC power outlet (NEMA 5-15 US 120VAC / Schuko EU 230VAC)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: 12-period programmable daily temperature schedule, compressor delay protection
compatible_devices.notes: WORK1 relay activates heater when temp falls below setpoint; in combined temp+humidity mode WORK1 handles both heating and cooling from one relay; US version 120VAC 15A 1800W max; EU version 230VAC available

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC power outlet (NEMA 5-15 US 120VAC / Schuko EU 230VAC)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: 12-period programmable temperature schedule
compatible_devices.notes: WORK2 relay activates cooling fan or AC unit when temp rises above setpoint in temperature-only mode; on/off control only, no speed modulation; in combined mode WORK2 is used for humidity device instead

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC power outlet (NEMA 5-15 US 120VAC / Schuko EU 230VAC)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: 12-period programmable daily humidity schedule
compatible_devices.notes: WORK1 (humidity-only mode) or WORK2 (combined temp+humidity mode) activates humidifier when RH drops below setpoint; requires HTG3515CH humidity probe (included); measurement range 5–99% RH; on/off only

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC power outlet (NEMA 5-15 US 120VAC / Schuko EU 230VAC)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: 12-period programmable humidity schedule
compatible_devices.notes: WORK2 relay activates dehumidifier when RH rises above setpoint in humidity or combined mode; on/off control only; humidity probe required; max 1800W total across both outlets (US version)

compatible_devices.compatible_series: FC series, FC-E series, TS series, SP series
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: PPFD auto-mode, VPD monitoring, sunrise/sunset simulation, custom schedule, CO2/temp/humidity-triggered dimming
compatible_devices.notes: Compatible: FC, FC-E, TS (TS600 excluded), SP3000, SP3000R, ADlite100; up to 40 units in series via RJ12 daisy-chain; CANNOT control inline fans or oscillating clip fans — explicit manufacturer limitation

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: ADlite100, UV light bar, IR light bar
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: iHub-4C power strip (original generation, not iHub-4AC 2.0)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: synchronized on/off and timer scheduling for UV/IR/RED/BLUE supplemental bars
compatible_devices.notes: iHub-4AC 2.0 is NOT compatible with Controller 43 — only the earlier iHub-4C or original iHub-4AC works; on/off and timer only for supplemental bars

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: 3-in-1 temp/humidity/light sensor, PPFD sensor, CO2 sensor
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: multi-parameter monitoring (temperature, humidity, light, PPFD, CO2) as automation triggers for light and power strip control
compatible_devices.notes: 3-in-1 sensor included in box; PPFD sensor and CO2 sensor sold separately; sensors feed automation logic for lighting and connected devices

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: humidity-triggered on/off via connected power strip outlets
compatible_devices.notes: On/off via iHub-4C power strip; Mars Hydro 6L/15L humidifiers with RJ12 are confirmed for iControl/iHub Pro only, not Controller 43; third-party humidifiers via AC outlet

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: humidity-triggered on/off via connected power strip outlets
compatible_devices.notes: On/off via iHub-4C power strip outlets; Mars Hydro 12L dehumidifier with RJ12 confirmed for iControl only

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature-triggered on/off via connected power strip outlets
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only; heat mats and space heaters supported via AC outlet on iHub-4C; no power regulation

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: iHub-4C power strip + optional CO2 sensor
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2-triggered on/off (requires optional CO2 sensor connected to Controller 43)
compatible_devices.notes: Controller 43 has CO2 as one of its 6 control modes; CO2 sensor sold separately; actual CO2 generator triggered via iHub-4C outlet on/off only

compatible_devices.compatible_series: FC series, FC-E series, SP series, TS series
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD monitoring, PPFD auto-mode, sunrise/sunset simulation, custom schedule, dimming 0-100%
compatible_devices.notes: 2024+ smart versions with USB dimmer port required; older FC/FC-E/TS with manual-only dimmer knob are not compatible; one iConnectu per light unit; multiple lights manageable via MarsPro app grouping; RJ12 expansion port enables ecosystem connectivity

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: iFresh 4" (100mm), iFresh 6" (150mm)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: on/off scheduling; cycle timing for irrigation intervals
compatible_devices.notes: DWC systems and drip irrigation explicitly listed; no flow rate control; independent dual-outlet allows pump and light on separate schedules

compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any 230V mains-powered CO2 generator or solenoid regulator
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: TechGrow CO2 Generator, Hotbox CO2 Generator, Pure Factory CO2 Generator LP
compatible_devices.notes: Activates any 230V/10A CO2 generator or solenoid regulator via mains socket when CO2 ppm falls below setpoint. Covers both gas-burner generators and CO2 cylinder systems with 230V-powered solenoid valves. Passive CO2 sources (bags, fermentation) cannot be controlled. Light sensor disables CO2 addition during dark cycle.

compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any 230V single-phase AC extraction or exhaust fan up to 10A
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK A1 series, Prima Klima mixed-flow AC fans, BioGreen AC extraction fans
compatible_devices.notes: On/off control only — fan runs at full speed or is off; no speed modulation. Activates the extraction fan when CO2 ppm exceeds the setpoint, to reduce CO2 concentration. Max 10A. EC fans and PWM fans are not compatible with this output; only single-phase AC fans should be used.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RAM RVK series, Systemair RVK-A, Rhino Pro inline fans
compatible_devices.notes: Controls 2 standard AC fans (FAN AIR IN + FAN AIR OUT Schuko sockets). 5-step heavy-duty mechanical transformer provides silent, buzz-free fan speed control. Available 4A, 8A, and 16A variants. Includes light sensor; removing cap activates PRO function which runs fans 1 step faster for 7 min per hour during dark periods — this is fan-based humidity management, not a separate humidifier output. No outputs for lights, heaters, CO2, or other devices. EC fans incompatible.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RAM RVK series, Systemair RVK-A, Rhino Pro inline fans
compatible_devices.notes: Functionally identical to Hybrid Controller Mk2 but ships with the 1.6m light sensor pre-included and PRO function ready to activate. Controls 2 standard AC fans (FAN AIR IN + FAN AIR OUT Schuko sockets). 5-step heavy-duty mechanical transformer for silent speed control. Available 4A, 8A, and 16A variants. PRO light-sensor function manages humidity via fan speed increase during dark periods only — no separate humidifier or other device output. EC fans incompatible.

compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any 230V single-phase irrigation or NFT submersible pump up to 2000W
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Nutriculture Wilma drip pump, Atami Wilma pump, standard NFT circulation pumps
compatible_devices.notes: Pre-programmed timer with 19 drip feeds per 12h or 18h light cycle; feed duration adjustable 0–99 seconds per dose. Controls any single-phase 230V pump up to 2000W (approx. 8.7A) via timed on/off. Must be powered in sync with the grow light (light on = NutriMatic on; light off = NutriMatic off and reset). Not suitable for precise mL-per-dose dosing pumps — controls pump runtime in seconds only, with no flow-rate awareness.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK, TT Fans AC, Prima Klima AC
compatible_devices.notes: Single AC fan socket; max 6.5A / 1500W; 'Motion Flow' stepless electronic phase regulation; temperature-controlled via optional NTC sensor; NOT compatible with EC fans, PWM fans, or circulation fans; no relay outputs for other devices

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RAM RVK series, Systemair RVK-A, Rhino Pro inline fans
compatible_devices.notes: Controls 2 standard AC fans (2 Schuko power sockets). Fully electronic continuous 0–100% speed control (dynamic range 0.5–8A or 0.5–16A). Available 8A and 16A variants. Expandable with up to 5 SPC Slave Mk2 units via proprietary link cable, each adding 2 more AC fan outputs. No outputs for lights, humidifiers, CO2, heaters, or any device other than AC fans. No PRO/light-sensor humidity function. EC fans incompatible; Cal.Min potentiometer allows trimming minimum speed for compatibility with different AC fan motors.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK, TT Fans AC, Prima Klima AC
compatible_devices.notes: Dual AC fan sockets (left = intake, right = exhaust); available in 4.5A and 7A models; electronic phase/PWM speed control; NTC sensor included (5m); manages negative pressure between intake and exhaust; NOT compatible with EC fans; no relay outputs for humidifiers, CO2, or heaters

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RAM RVK series, Systemair RVK-A, Rhino Pro inline fans
compatible_devices.notes: Controls 2 standard AC fans (FAN AIR IN + FAN AIR OUT Schuko sockets). Continuous MOTION FLOW software speed control (not stepped). Available 4.5A and 7A variants. PRO function (light sensor) boosts fan speed for a few minutes each hour during dark periods to expel humidity — does NOT have a dedicated humidifier or other device socket. EC fans are explicitly incompatible; use the separate SMSCOM Universal EC Fan Controller 0-10V instead. Max load 4.5A or 7A total.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 600W HPS ballast, Any 600W MH ballast
compatible_devices.notes: Digital timer relay controller; switches up to 2x600W HPS/MH lamp ballasts (2000W total); 2x16 LCD display; supports 24h and asymmetrical (up to 36h) timer cycles; built-in battery with 0-300min power failure protection; contactor rated 25A AC-7a; no sensor input; no fan, humidity, or CO2 outputs; no app or WiFi

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 600W HPS ballast, Any 600W MH ballast
compatible_devices.notes: Digital timer relay controller; switches up to 4x600W HPS/MH lamp ballasts (6x600W variant also available); 4x20 LCD display; 24h and asymmetrical timer; contactor 32A AC-3a; built-in battery power failure protection (0-300min); event log (20 events); no sensor input; no fan, humidity, or CO2 outputs; no app or WiFi; fuses: 2x10A slow

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: 600W HPS ballasts, 600W MH ballasts, 630W CMH ballasts
compatible_devices.notes: Relay-based on/off switching via 2 independent Schuko outlets rated 600W/8A each with hybrid relays; outlets switch staggered 5 s apart; 2 independent 24 H digital timers (synchronous and asynchronous); temperature protection via optional TechGrow temp probe; built-in log and battery for power-failure memory; no dimming capability

Relay switches mains AC power to LED driver; on/off only, no 0-10 V or PWM dimming; LED fixtures with IEC/Schuko power inlet work but lose any intensity-control capability; max 600 W per outlet; product is marketed for HID ballasts, not LED; compatibility inferred from relay design

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Temp Probe 2M, Temp Probe 5M, Temp Probe 10M
compatible_devices.notes: Probe used for temperature-protection function only (not climate automation); 5 M probe is the recommended option; Temp-RH combined humidity-temperature sensors are explicitly NOT compatible; S-4 sensor series NOT compatible; probe sold separately (SKU differs per length)

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 600W HPS ballast, Any 600W MH ballast
compatible_devices.notes: Digital timer relay controller with temperature-based lamp protection; switches up to 6x600W HPS/MH lamp ballasts via 6 individual hybrid relays (8A each, AC-5a); 4x20 LCD; 24h and asymmetrical timer; built-in ammeter with adjustable overload limit; temperature probe input enables sequential automatic lamp shutoff on overheating (up to 5 lamps); 100-event log; built-in battery power failure protection (0-300min); fuses: 2x15A slow; does NOT control fans, humidifiers, or CO2; no app or WiFi; temperature probe sold separately

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Temperature Probe 2M, Temperature Probe 5M, Temperature Probe 10M
compatible_devices.notes: Accepts TechGrow temperature probes (2M, 5M recommended, 10M also compatible) as sensor INPUT for temperature-based lamp shutoff; Temp-RH sensors and all S-4 sensors are explicitly NOT compatible; probe triggers sequential lamp deactivation when temperature threshold is exceeded; sensor sold separately

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 600W HPS ballast, Any 600W MH ballast
compatible_devices.notes: Mechanical analog timer relay controller; switches up to 4x600W HPS/MH lamp ballasts via standard Schuko outlets; mechanical clock with 15-minute intervals, max 48 switching moments per 24h cycle; three modes: clock, on, off; no sensors, no digital features, no app or WiFi; designed for HID lamps only

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK 125L A1, Vents TT 150, Blauberg Turbo 150
compatible_devices.notes: Temperature-only fan speed control via triac. Available in 7A (12A triac) and 14A (24A triac) versions. Controls up to 2 fans. No heater relay, no humidity control, no external sensor port — uses pre-mounted temp probe only. EC/PWM fans NOT compatible.
Triac-controlled Schuko outlets can power AC circulation fans within the 7A or 14A version fuse limits. EC/PWM fans not compatible.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK 100 A1, Vents TT 100, Blauberg Turbo 100
compatible_devices.notes: Temperature-only fan speed control via triac (8A fuse, 12A triac on standard model). Controls up to 2 fans. No humidity or CO2 monitoring. No heater relay. No external sensor port — uses pre-mounted 4.5m temperature probe only. Not compatible with any external sensors.
Triac-based Schuko outlets can power AC circulation fans within the 8A fuse limit. EC/PWM fans not compatible.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK, Prima Klima Siltek, Vents TT
compatible_devices.notes: Triac (24A rated, 14A fuse) provides phase-cut AC speed control of one inline fan; fan speed adjustable 0-100% in 2% steps; EC fans are NOT compatible as Triac cannot drive EC motor controllers; day/night control via built-in light sensor

Dedicated heater relay output (15A fuse); controls one heater; alarm contact disconnects external load when adjustable over-temperature threshold is exceeded, allowing connection of a safety cutoff relay

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Temp/RH Sensor, S-4 CO2 2000ppm
compatible_devices.notes: 3 UTP ports; Temp/RH sensor required for operation (sold separately); S-4 CO2 sensor value displayed on screen only — CO2 equipment is not actively controlled; Probe, S-2, and S-Eco sensors are NOT compatible; TechGrow SMS module AM-T and Datalogger DL-1 can also be connected

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK 125 A1, Vents TT 125, Blauberg Turbo 125
compatible_devices.notes: Controls up to 2 AC fans via triac-based speed control. Temperature + humidity control with day/night modes. Available in 7A (12A triac) and 14A (24A triac) versions. No heater relay. EC fans requiring 0-10V or PWM are NOT compatible.
AC circulation fans can be connected to the triac-controlled Schuko outlets. Max load depends on version (7A or 14A fuse).

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: TechGrow S-4 CO2/RH/Temp Sensor (2000ppm), TechGrow Temp/RH Sensor
compatible_devices.notes: S-4 sensor provides CO2 display (monitoring, 0-2000 ppm), RH, temperature and day/night light detection. Controller displays CO2 values from S-4 but does NOT have a CO2 equipment control relay. S-2 and S-Eco sensors NOT compatible. Also compatible with TechGrow DL-1 Datalogger and AM-T SMS module.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK, Can-Fan Classic, RAM Air, Winflex
compatible_devices.notes: Available as Clima Eco 5A (Min-speed), 5A (Min-Max speed), or 5A (Temp-RH). All use an 8A triac (5A fused). Clima Control Eco 15A variant uses 12A triac. Fan speed ramps slowly for stable climate. Temperature range 15-35°C (or 10-45°C on Clima Control Eco). AC induction motor fans only — EC fans not compatible. Up to 2 fans on Clima Control Eco 15A variant.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: TechGrow Temp probe 2m, TechGrow Temp probe 5m, TechGrow Temp/RH sensor
compatible_devices.notes: Temperature probe (2m/5m/10m) compatible with all Clima Eco variants. Temp/RH sensor only supported by the Clima Eco 5A Temp-RH variant, enabling humidity-based fan control (RH setpoint 40-90%, fixed 3% hysteresis). CO2 sensors (S-2, S-4, S-Eco) are explicitly incompatible with Clima Eco.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK 125 A1, Vents TT 125, Blauberg Turbo 125
compatible_devices.notes: Controls fan speed via triac (5A fuse, 12A triac). Compatible with any 230V AC single-phase induction motor fan. Supports up to 2 fans. EC fans requiring 0-10V or PWM control are NOT compatible. Min fan speed adjustable 10-100% in 2% increments.
Triac-based Schuko outlet can power AC circulation fans. Total combined load across all outlets must not exceed 5A fuse rating. Only works with AC motor fans, not EC/PWM circulation fans.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: TechGrow Temp/RH Sensor, TechGrow Temp probe
compatible_devices.notes: Has 3x UTP (RJ45) sensor ports. Compatible with TechGrow Temp/RH Sensor and Temp probe. S-4, S-2, and S-Eco CO2 sensors are explicitly NOT compatible with the Clima Micro Plus.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK, Can-Fan Classic, RAM Air, Winflex
compatible_devices.notes: 12A triac phase-cut output. Speed set separately for day and night via two rotary knobs (0-100%). Automatic day/night switching via built-in light sensor; 0-10 min delay configurable. AC induction motor fans only — EC fans (0-10V or PWM) are not compatible. No external sensor ports; cannot measure or react to temperature, humidity, or CO2.

Dedicated humidifier relay output, 7A fuse (8A switching capacity); operates independently from dehumidifier output allowing simultaneous control; automatic day/night setpoint switching via external light sensor; humidity range 10-90% RH

Dedicated dehumidifier relay output, 14A fuse (15A switching capacity); higher amperage than humidifier output to support powerful dehumidifiers up to ~3200W; operates independently and simultaneously with humidifier output; key differentiator from Humi Twin and Humi Heavy which have only one shared relay

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Temp/RH Sensor, S-4 CO2 2000ppm, S-4 CO2 10000ppm
compatible_devices.notes: 3 UTP ports; sensor sold separately and required for operation; S-2, S-Eco, and Temp probe sensors NOT compatible; external light sensor port enables automatic day/night humidity setpoint switching; TechGrow Datalogger DL-1 connectable via UTP

Single 230V relay output rated 10A (10A fuse); designed for powerful humidifiers up to ~2300W; manual toggle switch on back selects humidifier OR dehumidifier mode — only one mode active at a time; higher capacity than Humi Twin (6A) for industrial/large-room humidifiers

Same single 10A relay as humidifier mode; back-mounted switch sets dehumidify mode; 10A / ~2300W limit supports most professional dehumidifiers; cannot run humidifier and dehumidifier simultaneously — use Humi Dual Pro for dual simultaneous control

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Temp/RH Sensor, S-4 CO2 2000ppm, S-4 CO2 10000ppm
compatible_devices.notes: Sensor sold separately and required for operation; S-2, S-Eco, and Temp probe sensors are NOT compatible; UTP cable (5m) included in box

Single 230V relay output rated 6A (8A relay / 6.4A fuse); manual toggle switch on back selects humidifier OR dehumidifier mode — only one mode active at a time, cannot control both devices simultaneously; any brand humidifier within 6A/230V rating is compatible

Same single relay as humidifier mode; back-mounted mode switch must be set to dehumidify; 6A limit means only lower-wattage dehumidifiers (max ~1380W) are supported; for more powerful dehumidifiers use Humi Heavy (10A) or Humi Dual Pro (14A)

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Temp/RH Sensor, S-4 CO2 2000ppm, S-4 CO2 10000ppm
compatible_devices.notes: Sensor sold separately and required for operation; S-2, S-Eco, and Temp probe sensors are NOT compatible; TechGrow Datalogger DL-1 can also be connected via UTP

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Hotbox CO2 Generator, Kayser CO2 solenoid valve
compatible_devices.notes: Controls CO2 generators and CO2 cylinder solenoid valves via 8A relay (100-220V); supports 300-2000ppm and 300-10000ppm ranges (sensor-dependent); day/night auto-switching; temp/humidity display when S-4 sensor connected; 7-day dosing log; adjustable pulse dosing; compatible with TechGrow DL-1 Datalogger; no fan/light/humidity control

Compatible with TechGrow S-2 and S-4 in both 0-2000ppm AND 0-10000ppm versions; S-4 sensor also provides temperature and humidity display; light sensor in CO2 sensor enables day/night switching; also interfaces with TechGrow DL-1 Datalogger via UTP

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK, Can-Fan Classic, RAM Air inline fan
compatible_devices.notes: Fan triac output available in 4.5A, 7A, and 14A versions (8A, 12A, 24A triac respectively). Fan speed is automatically modulated based on CO2, temperature, and humidity setpoints. EC fans (0-10V or PWM) are not compatible. Humidity is managed indirectly by increasing ventilation speed; no separate humidifier relay exists on this unit.

Dedicated 8A CO2 relay output (fused at 4A). Controls both propane/gas CO2 generators and compressed-CO2 bottle systems via solenoid valve. CO2 dosing is automatically suspended at night (via built-in light sensor in S-4 sensor) and when humidity exceeds setpoint.

Sensor sold separately and is mandatory for operation. S-4 measures CO2, temperature, relative humidity, and ambient light (day/night detection). Explicitly incompatible with S-2 (all ranges), S-Eco, and standalone Temp/RH or temperature probe sensors.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Hotbox 4KW CO2 Generator, Hotbox 10KW CO2 Generator, Kayser CO2 solenoid valve
compatible_devices.notes: Controls any CO2 generator or CO2 cylinder solenoid valve drawing up to 8A at 100-220V; entry-level single-relay CO2 controller; day/night auto-switching via light sensor; CO2 range 300-2000ppm; no app, no fan/light/humidity control; sensor sold separately

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: S-Eco, S-2, S-4
compatible_devices.notes: Compatible with TechGrow S-Eco, S-2, S-4 in 0-2000ppm versions only; 10000ppm sensor versions NOT compatible; light sensor in CO2 sensor enables day/night switching; 5m UTP cable included

Sole controllable output is the CO2 relay (8A rated, 4A fused). Controls CO2 generators or bottled CO2 with solenoid valve. Built-in CO2 and light sensors — no external sensor port. Has NO fan output; the internal fan is only for airflow across the built-in sensor, not for room ventilation control. No humidity or temperature relay outputs.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Hotbox CO2 Generator, Kayser CO2 solenoid valve
compatible_devices.notes: Controls any CO2 generator or CO2 cylinder solenoid valve drawing up to 8A at 100-220V via built-in relay; day/night auto-switching via light sensor integrated in CO2 sensor; CO2 range 300-2000ppm; no app, no fan/light/humidity control; sensor sold separately

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: S-Eco, S-2, S-4
compatible_devices.notes: Compatible with TechGrow S-Eco, S-2, S-4 in 0-2000ppm versions only; 10000ppm sensor versions NOT compatible with T-Nano; light sensor integrated in CO2 sensor enables day/night switching; 5m UTP cable included

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule-based, Feed on Demand (with WCS sensors)
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 5 OA6-110 boards per NFS-1 (6 outputs each = up to 30 zones). Controls any standard 110VAC irrigation pump. NFS-1 is irrigation-only; does not control fans, lights, or climate.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule-based zone control, Feed on Demand (with WCS), watering confirmation (with WD-1)
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 5 OA6-24 boards per NFS-1 (6 outputs each = up to 30 zones). Compatible with any standard 24VAC irrigation solenoid valve.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule-based activation
compatible_devices.notes: Dosatron inline dosing injectors can be activated on schedule via DSP-1; on/off relay only, no volume feedback without DFM flow meter.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: EC/PPM and temperature monitoring, alerts via app
compatible_devices.notes: PCT-1 for tank, PCT-2 for inline installation. Max 1 EC/temp sensor per NFS-1 set. Monitoring only.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: WCS-1, WCS-2, WD-1

compatible_devices.notes: Up to 8 water content sensors (WCS) per NFS-1 for Feed on Demand. Up to 30 WD-1 water leak detectors. WD-1 included with NFS-1 system.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, Feed on Demand, Feed by Volume, Multiple Pump Link, crop steering
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 240 total devices per NFS-3. Multiple Pump Link enables complex multi-zone pump-to-valve assignments. 7-inch LCD touchscreen controller.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, Feed on Demand, Multiple Pump Link, zone linking
compatible_devices.notes: 240 total device capacity for large commercial operations. Multiple Pump Link allows different pumps to link with different valves.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule-based activation, volume-based dosing (with DFM flow meters)
compatible_devices.notes: Dosatron inline dosing injectors activated via relay. Full volume control requires optional DFM flow meters.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: PPH-1, PPH-2, PPH-3
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: pH monitoring, mobile alerts, crop steering integration
compatible_devices.notes: AMP-3 included with NFS-3. Up to 25 individual sensors supported. PPH-3 for inline installation.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: PCT-1, PCT-2, PCT-3
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: EC/PPM + water temperature monitoring, grow medium EC via WCS-9, crop steering alerts
compatible_devices.notes: WCS-9 additionally measures grow medium EC and temperature directly in substrate. Up to 25 sensors per NFS-3.

compatible_devices.compatible_series: WCS series, WCS-9, WN-9, DFM series
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: WCS-1, WCS-2, WCS-3, WCS-9, DFM-1, DFM-2, DFM-3

compatible_devices.notes: WCS-9 measures VWC, EC, and temperature simultaneously in substrate. WN-9 is a wireless substrate sensor node. DFM-1/2/3 flow meters enable volume-based irrigation. Up to 25 sensors per NFS-3.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, Feed on Demand, Feed by Volume (with DFM-1), Multiple Pump Link
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 50 control modules per NFS-2. DSR-1 handles 25A/100-277VAC for larger commercial pumps. Up to 300 pumps/solenoids with linked NFS-2 controllers.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, Feed on Demand, zone linking, remote monitoring
compatible_devices.notes: OAT-24 provides 12 outputs per board for higher zone density. Solenoids and pumps can be linked across zones.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule-based activation, volume-based dosing (with DFM-1 flow meter)
