compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: pH monitoring, mobile alerts
compatible_devices.notes: AMP-3 included with NFS-2. Monitoring and alerting; automated pH correction requires dosing pump integration.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: PCT-1, PCT-2, PCT-3
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: EC/PPM + temperature monitoring, crop steering alerts
compatible_devices.notes: AMP-3 included with NFS-2. Up to 50 total sensors per system.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: WCS-1, WCS-2, DFM-1, WD-1
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Feed on Demand (WCS), Feed by Volume (DFM-1), crop steering, leak detection
compatible_devices.notes: WCS-1/WCS-2 for substrate water content and EC. DFM-1 flow meter enables volume-based irrigation. Up to 50 total sensors per NFS-2.

controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-1 Digital Day/Night Remote Controller

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-1 Digital Day/Night Remote Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Mitsubishi, LG, Samsung, Fujitsu, Pioneer mini-splits
compatible_devices.notes: Standalone single-task controller; not integrated with TM+ Pro or other TrolMaster systems. Uses IR teach-and-learn from original AC remote. Automates day/night temperature setpoints via photocell. NOT compatible with: Daikin, Mr. Cool, Innovair, Cooper, Hunter. Cannot access all AC modes (e.g., fan-only, dehumidify mode). Input 120V AC.

controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-2 Digital Day/Night Fan Speed Controller

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-2 Digital Day/Night Fan Speed Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any 120V AC induction motor inline fan
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Can-Fan RK series, Hurricane Commercial Grade Inline Fan, Active Air AC inline fans
compatible_devices.notes: Triac phase-cut provides variable speed 25–100% based on temperature setpoint; day/night setpoints configurable separately via built-in photocell. Connected fan must be 120V and must not exceed 4.5A continuous (6A fuse). EC motor fans (AC Infinity CLOUDLINE, Phresh HyperFan, Can-Fan Max) are NOT compatible — EC motors require 0–10V or PWM signal and can be damaged by phase-cut AC. Controller is 120V/60 Hz (US market); requires step-down transformer for 230V/50 Hz German market.

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-2 Digital Day/Night Fan Speed Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Hurricane clip fans (AC motor models), Active Air AC clip fans
compatible_devices.notes: Triac phase-cut speed control can work for AC motor circulation fans but small shaded-pole motors (common in cheap clip fans) can overheat or be damaged by phase-cut voltage at low speeds; verify fan compatibility before use. Max 4.5A. Controller is 120V only.

controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-4 Digital Day/Night Temperature Controller

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-4 Digital Day/Night Temperature Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Dr. Heater DR-968, Comfort Zone CZ750, King Electric portable heaters
compatible_devices.notes: Heating mode: relay activates heater when temperature falls below setpoint; deactivates once setpoint is reached. Day and night setpoints independently configurable via built-in photocell. Any 120V electric heater drawing ≤10A is plug-and-play compatible. Controller is 120V only (US market); requires step-down transformer for 230V German market.

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-4 Digital Day/Night Temperature Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any 120V AC inline or exhaust fan ≤10A
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Can-Fan RK series, Hurricane, Active Air inline fans
compatible_devices.notes: Cooling mode: relay switches fan fully on when temperature exceeds setpoint; on/off only — no variable speed control (relay-based, not triac). For speed-controlled fan operation use BETA-2 instead. Max 10A. Controller is 120V only.

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-4 Digital Day/Night Temperature Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Hurricane clip fans, Active Air clip fans, Hydrofarm clip fans
compatible_devices.notes: On/off relay only in cooling mode; activates circulation fan above temperature setpoint. No speed control. Useful as secondary cooling assist in high-temperature situations. Controller is 120V only.

controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-6 Digital Day/Night Humidity Controller

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-6 Digital Day/Night Humidity Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Honeywell HCM-350, Pure Enrichment MistAire XL, Vornado EVDC300
compatible_devices.notes: Humidify mode must be selected on the controller; relay activates humidifier when RH drops below setpoint. Day and night RH setpoints independently configurable. Control range 20–90% RH, deadband 5%. Any 120V humidifier or ultrasonic fogger drawing ≤10A is plug-and-play compatible. Controller is 120V only (US market); requires step-down transformer for 230V German market.

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-6 Digital Day/Night Humidity Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: hOmeLabs HME020031N 35-pint, Frigidaire FFAD3033R1, Keystone KSTAD50B
compatible_devices.notes: Dehumidify mode must be selected on the controller (mode is user-selectable — only one device type connected at a time). Relay activates dehumidifier when RH exceeds setpoint. Any 120V dehumidifier drawing ≤10A is plug-and-play compatible. Controller is 120V only.

controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-8 Digital CO2 PPM Controller

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-8 Digital CO2 PPM Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any 120V propane or natural gas CO2 generator/burner ≤6A
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Autopilot APCO8LP, Titan Controls Ares 8, CAP LP4
compatible_devices.notes: Basic on/off relay control of the generator's ignition circuit works. CRITICAL: Fuzzy Logic mode must NOT be used with CO2 generators — Fuzzy Logic is compatible ONLY with compressed CO2 regulators and may damage or cause unsafe rapid cycling of burners. Photocell ensures CO2 enrichment occurs during daylight hours only. NDIR sensor, ±50 PPM accuracy, 400–2000 PPM range. Max 6A. Controller is 120V only (US market); step-down transformer required for 230V German market.

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-8 Digital CO2 PPM Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any 120V compressed CO2 regulator with solenoid valve ≤6A
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Titan Controls Atlas 2 solenoid regulator, Autopilot CO2 regulator with solenoid, Milwaukee MC122
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Fuzzy Logic PPM regulation (compressed CO2 only): anticipates CO2 drift and pulses solenoid for tighter PPM accuracy
compatible_devices.notes: Controls solenoid valve of compressed CO2 regulator via relay. Full control including Fuzzy Logic mode for precise PPM management — Fuzzy Logic rapidly pulses the solenoid to counteract CO2 drift and achieve tighter setpoint accuracy. Adjustable deadband 20–200 PPM. Photocell limits CO2 injection to daylight hours only. Max 6A. Controller is 120V only.

CDA-1 is a CO2 safety alarm system, not a general grow controller. DSC-1 outlet activates ventilation fans ONLY as emergency response when CO2 exceeds programmed high threshold. Not suitable for routine climate fan control.

CDA-1 monitors up to 13 CO2 sensor zones (MBS-K30) per alarm channel. DSE-1 automatically cuts power to the main CO2 solenoid on fault or high CO2 threshold. DSD-1 dry contact can interface with fire/alarm panels (N/O and N/C). Not a setpoint-based CO2 injection controller - safety/alarm purpose only.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based speed control, temperature/humidity target automation, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 4 EFC-1 units per GCS-1 (vs. 2 on TCS-1). Mode (0-10V or PWM) user-selectable. Aerofan brand fans can daisy-chain directly to DEVICE port without EFC-1.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based speed control, temperature/humidity automation
compatible_devices.notes: Same EFC-1 adapter; 0-10V/PWM mode is user-selectable. Up to 4 EFC-1 units per GCS-1.

supported_devices: CO2 regulators/generators, inline exhaust fans
port_types: AC outlet (x2), 3.5mm probe
compatible_ec_fans: any (on/off via AC outlet)
compatible_sensors: AC Infinity CO2 probe with photoacoustic sensor (included; 144 in / 12 ft cord)
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 regulator or generator via standard AC outlet
recommended_use_note: Dedicated standalone CO2 controller; pairs CO2 regulator (Outlet 1) with exhaust fan (Outlet 2) using PPM threshold triggers; no app or internet required; fully local operation
notes: Model AC-CTC7. No WiFi or Bluetooth — fully standalone. Photoacoustic CO2 sensor; range 0-10,000 PPM per spec (display shows 0-5000 PPM range per manual). Modes: CO2 Center/Zone, Fan Center/Zone, Cycle, On, Off. Outlet 1 and Outlet 2 independently programmed. Night scheduling (NIGHT1, NIGHT2), alarm HIGH/LOW thresholds. Data logging is local only (LED CO2 chart on display, no export). Detached dual-outlet socket module (separate from display unit). Wall-mount with keyhole hanger; wood screws and wire mount included.

supported_devices: EC inline fans, exhaust fans, LED grow lights, humidifiers, heaters, air conditioners, third-party outlet devices via UIS Control Plug adapter
port_types: UIS (x8), 3.5mm probe (3 sensor slots: 1 built-in + corded probe + 1 expansion)
ai_notes: AI observes environment patterns, anticipates climate spikes, and adjusts device output to exact percentages using adaptive algorithms (manufacturer describes as machine learning; independent reviews suggest PID-based adaptive control). Beginner mode provides fully automated grow management; Advanced mode enables manual tuning. In-app chatbot for grow questions. AI light schedule optimization automatically shifts lights to cooler periods. CO2 management requires optional CO2+Light sensor (sold separately). App provides performance scores and recommendations.

uvp_notes: Bluelab EMEA official price €655 (incl. VAT) per search-result snippet; EMEA page returned 404 at time of fetch. growshop-germany.de lists at €690 incl. 19% VAT.
notes: Model CONTPHCON. Built-in 10 ml/min peristaltic pump; single-direction pH dosing (up OR down, user-selectable). pH range 0.1-13.9, resolution 0.1, accuracy ±0.1 at 25°C. Reservoirs up to 200 US gallons / 760 L. Wireless connectivity requires separately purchased Bluelab Connect Stick (2.4 GHz ISM, proprietary protocol; indoor range up to 20 m, outdoor up to 50 m); data logging and remote monitoring via free Bluelab Connect PC/mobile software. Connect Stick is NOT included — Amazon.de listing title confirms 'Excludes Connect Stick'. Wall-mount, water-resistant. International power supply (100-240V AC). 2 m probe cable, 4 m acid/alkali-resistant dosing tube. 2-year device warranty, 6-month pH probe warranty. Made in New Zealand.

supported_devices: built-in variable-speed peristaltic pump for pH dosing
port_types: BNC pH probe, temperature probe, peristaltic pump outlet
compatible_sensors: Bluelab pH probe (BNC), Bluelab temperature probe
recommended_use_note: pH dosing with Wi-Fi remote monitoring and control via Edenic app; single-direction pH dosing; upgraded variable-speed pump vs older Connect model
uvp_notes: Official Bluelab EU store price €630 incl. VAT. Some EU retailers list higher (growmart.eu €749; led-grower.eu €559.96 — possible sale). US website lists $660 USD.
notes: Model BCTPHC02. Built-in variable-speed peristaltic pump up to 120 ml/min (vs 10 ml/min on older CONTPH/CONTPHCON). Single-direction pH dosing (pH-up OR pH-down, user-selectable). pH range 0.0-14.0, resolution 0.1, accuracy ±0.1 at 25°C. Temperature 0-50°C, accuracy ±1°C. Built-in Wi-Fi (can be disabled in settings) + Bluetooth for Edenic app pairing. OTA firmware updates. Remote monitoring, control, alarms, and history via Edenic by Bluelab app (Android 8.0+ / iOS 12+). Power supply: 100-240V AC input, 5VDC 1.5A output. 2 m probe cable, 4 m acid-resistant dosing tube. Replaceable pH probe and pump cassette. CE/FCC/RoHS certified. 2-year device warranty, 6-month pH probe warranty. Made in New Zealand. Sold out on bluelab.com at time of research but in stock at eu.bluelab.com.

notes: Model CONTPH. Built-in 10 ml/min peristaltic pump; single-direction pH dosing only (up OR down, user-selectable). pH range 0.1-13.9, resolution 0.1, accuracy ±0.1 at 25°C. Automatic temperature compensation via separate probe. Reservoirs up to 200 US gallons / 760 L. Dose on-time 1-60 sec, off-time 1-60 min adjustable. Alarm lockout halts dosing when out of range. Wall-mount, water-resistant enclosure. Multi-language support including German. International power supply (100-240V AC). 2 m probe cable, 4 m acid/alkali-resistant dosing tube included. CE/FCC certified. 2-year device warranty, 6-month pH probe warranty. Made in New Zealand. Not listed on eu.bluelab.com — may be phased out in favour of the Wi-Fi version.

compatible_sensors: Bluelab pH probe (BNC), Bluelab temperature probe, Bluelab conductivity probe

recommended_use_note: Full pH, EC, and temperature monitoring with automated multi-nutrient dosing; up to 12 nutrient channels via daisy-chained PeriPods; remote data logging via Bluelab Connect (Connect Stick sold separately)
uvp_notes: EU retailer price (growmart.eu) including 19% VAT, listed as 'Bluelab Pro Controller' (Connect version). JJSTech lists at $1,399 USD. Not sold on eu.bluelab.com (only Wi-Fi version at €1,560 listed there).
notes: Model CONTPRO. No built-in pump — requires external Bluelab PeriPod for all dosing (controller ships as 'base only, no pump'). Monitors and controls pH, EC (conductivity), and temperature. Can dose both pH-up and pH-down simultaneously via separate PeriPod channels, plus up to 12 nutrient channels total (3× PeriPod M4 at 4 pumps each). pH range 0.1-13.9, accuracy ±0.1. EC range 0-4.9 EC / 0-49 CF / 0-2450 ppm 500 / 0-3430 ppm 700, accuracy ±0.1 EC. Temperature 1-59°C, accuracy ±1°C. Optional temperature control via Bluelab PowerPod accessory (switches heater or chiller). Remote monitoring and data logging via Bluelab Connect Stick (sold separately; 2.4 GHz ISM proprietary protocol) and free Bluelab Connect PC/mobile software. Visual high/low alarms; external lockout/alarm box port. Probe cable 2 m/6.5 ft. International power supply (100-240V AC). 2-year device warranty, 6-month pH probe warranty. Made in New Zealand. Being superseded by Pro Controller Wi-Fi (eu.bluelab.com €1,560) but still actively sold through distributors.

Bluetooth + Wi-Fi both connect to Edenic app (Android 8.0+ / iOS 12+). Internet required for remote access and data logging. Display uses plant-safe green LEDs. Power supply: Input 100–240 VAC 50/60 Hz, Output 5 VDC 1.5 A, with Type A/C/G/I interchangeable plugs. pH range 0.0–14.0, EC 0–5.0, temp 0–50°C. No Amazon.de listing found (Amazon.com ASIN B0D1WGQY9N is US-only).

notes: Original standalone Pro Controller — predates the 'Pro Controller Connect' (CONTPRO) which added Bluelab Connect data-logging capability. Discontinued: bluelab.com/catalogue/bluelab-pro-controller returns 404; not listed in Bluelab support portal manual downloads (only 'Pro Controller Connect' and 'Pro Controller Wi-Fi' manuals listed). Hort Americas hosted a separate 'Pro Controller™ Manual' (without 'With Connect' in title), confirming this was a distinct earlier product. Measured pH, EC, and temperature; automated dosing via external Bluelab PeriPod; temperature control via optional Bluelab PowerPod. No connectivity. Amazon.de ASIN B07N8YBNDV ('Bluelab Pro Controller pH - EC') is provisionally assigned but unverified — it may be a duplicate listing for the CONTPRO. Confidence level D due to discontinued status and near-absence of surviving specification data.

supported_devices: fans, air conditioners, heaters, dehumidifiers, humidifiers, foggers, CO2 injection/extraction equipment, 2 banks of lights; controlled via 24 VDC relay boxes

supported_manufacturer_series: Bluelab EnviroSensor
recommended_use_note: Commercial grow room climate management; controls temperature, humidity, CO2, and 2 light banks via 9 relay-driven output channels; effective for rooms up to 10×10 m; add second EnviroSensor for larger areas
uvp_notes: US retailer Green Thumb Depot lists complete kit at $2,200 USD; Canadian retailer Evergreen Botany lists at CAD $4,508. No EUR price found. Not listed on EU Bluelab store.
notes: Formerly Autogrow IntelliClimate; acquired by Bluelab portfolio via Excel Seeds acquisition. Wi-Fi requires optional Bluelab IntelliLink (USB accessory, sold separately; 2.4 GHz only). The 9 outputs are 24 VDC at 3 A per port (total limited by 24 V 2.5 A power supply); outputs drive relay boxes that switch mains-voltage equipment. Features Autolearn CO2 cycle optimisation, Autoset stage-based scheduling, and advanced rules engine. Supports dual EnviroSensor for areas larger than 10×10 m. USB to PC for data logging via IntelliGrow software. Fan control is on/off only via relay, not variable speed. Temp accuracy ±0.5°C, RH accuracy ±2%, CO2 accuracy ±50 ppm.

Formerly an Autogrow product, now part of Bluelab ecosystem after Excel Seeds acquisition. Supports proportional dosing and sequential pump control. Day/night EC targets. Up to 9-part dosing OR up to 5-part dosing + 4 irrigation stations. Large graphical LCD with 4-key interface. pH range 2–12, EC 0–10, temp 0–50°C. Dimensions from US retailer listing (may include packaging).

Part of Advance Climate Solutions line. Also mechanically controls gas supply valve in parallel with fan speed. Available in 5A, 7A, 11A, 13A variants. No confirmed Amazon.de listing found.

Fireproof high-temperature alloy plastic housing. AirFan B.V., Netherlands.

notes: Model Tempcon-2020 (manufacturer); retail model code CLI-TEMP16 (lichtblick-frankfurt.de). Temperature range 10-60°C. External temperature probe 5m. Dual mode: heating (controls heater) or cooling (controls ventilation fan via on/off). 1°C control steps. Digital LCD display. 2°C differential (e.g. set 20°C, heater activates below, stops above 22°C). Settings memory retained after power loss. IP44. Fireproof high-temperature alloy plastic housing. AirFan B.V., Netherlands.

supported_devices: Single-phase AC induction motor fans and extractors
recommended_use_note: Variable frequency drive for single-phase AC induction motor fans; 100% digital stepless control; eliminates motor hum/vibration at low speeds; suits grow rooms needing near-silent low-speed operation
uvp_notes: Price shown for 3A variant. Range: ~€299 (3A), ~€369 (7A), ~€439 (15A). Retailer is EU but not specifically Germany. German growshop grownrw-bayern.de listed 7A at €328.90.
notes: Variable frequency drive (VFD) that controls single-phase AC induction motor speed by varying output frequency (5–50Hz). 100% digital stepless; large LCD display; AUTO and MANUAL modes; temp range 5–55°C; switching differential 1°C per step. Available in 3A (660W), 7A (1540W), 15A (3300W). IP44 per manufacturer site (some retailers list IP20 or IP32 — use manufacturer value). Dimensions from manufacturer: 170x210x120mm (some retailers list 190x130x143mm — discrepancy unresolved). Some retailers incorrectly label as 'EC Fan Controller'; this is a VFD for AC induction motors, incompatible with true EC/brushless DC fans. Includes metal mounting plate and temperature probe. No confirmed Amazon.de listing found.

supported_devices: AC fans
recommended_use_note: 5-step temperature-triggered fan speed controller with copper coil transformer for silent operation; combines thermostat control with discrete step-based speed selection; 2 fan connections; suits growers who want automatic temperature response without continuous analog adjustment
uvp_notes: Price from Spanish retailer; no German-specific price confirmed. Available in 7A and 12A variants; price shown is for 7A.
notes: 5-step temperature-triggered fan speed controller using a copper coil transformer (trafo); 'Hybrid' name refers to combining thermostat temperature response with step-based speed control. Temperature range 11–45°C; 1°C per step hysteresis; 5m temperature probe included; 2 fan inlets; adjustable min/max speeds via knobs; external fuse cover for in-situ fuse replacement; IP44; output voltage steps: 90V/120V/150V/180V/220V. Available in 7A and 12A. Listed under Easy & Simple product line on manufacturer site (not Advance Climate Solutions). Significantly larger form factor than Climate/Multi Controllers. No confirmed Amazon.de listing found.

notes: Standalone all-in-one controller from Israeli manufacturer Grow Director Ltd. (Ness Ziona). The 2.0 generation featured an integrated 10" IPS touchscreen, 10 built-in relays, 7 analog/digital sensor inputs, 2x USB 2.0 ports, and 4 controlled power outlets. Supports up to 10 zones and up to 8-9 sensors simultaneously. Basic kit ships with air temperature and humidity sensors (2m cable each); pH, EC, CO2, soil moisture, PAR/LUX, water temperature sensors sold separately. Relay control is on/off only — no analog dimming or PWM fan speed without add-on modules. Unit continues to operate locally when internet is unavailable (confirmed by user reports). Discontinued and replaced by GrowDirector 3 PRO (fully wireless modular system with machine learning, launched ~2022-2023) and subsequently GrowDirector 4 PRO (2025). Dimensions and weight sourced from Hungarian retailer playgrowned.com; may vary by regional variant. Not found on Amazon.de.

uvp_notes: German growshop retail price. UK price was £383.95 at 1-hydroponics.co.uk.
notes: 2 internal 0-10V outputs enable EC fan control in addition to TRIAC phase-cut fan outputs. Light detector sensor enables automatic day/night mode switching. Pressure sensor expansion slot available (sensor sold separately). LCD display with 4-button navigation and 6 LED status indicators. Max 2200W per outlet but 3600W total system. A 400V 3-phase version also exists. Manufacturer: G-Systems Engineering Ltd. (Bulgaria).

supported_devices: AC fans
port_types: Schuko outlet
recommended_use_note: Basic temperature-based fan speed controller for single AC extraction fan. Two physical knobs: temperature setpoint and minimum fan speed. Available in 1A (200W), 5A (~1150W), and 10A (~2300W) variants.
uvp_notes: Price for 1A/200W variant (FC01-201FR). Higher-amperage versions cost more.
notes: Model code FC01-201FR (1A/200W). Also available in 5A and 10A variants. Case: 130x80x70mm; controller unit: 160x100x90mm. 5V digital temperature sensor, cable 4m extendable to 50m. TRIAC speed control. IP54. No display — two physical knobs for temperature setpoint and minimum fan speed. Amazon.de B00FJ5AQFA appears in searches for this category but cannot be confirmed as the digital version (Amazon.it labels same ASIN as analog).

supported_devices: AC fans
port_types: Schuko outlet (2x)
recommended_use_note: Controls fan speed for two AC fans based on temperature and negative pressure (vacuum). Prevents odours via negative pressure regulation. Also available in 10A and 16A variants.
uvp_notes: Price for 10A variant (FC11-202FR) incl. VAT from led-grower.eu. Amazon.de ASIN B004O298I0 corresponds to the 2A/2x200W variant at lower price.
notes: Model code FC11-202FR. Reads humidity (sensor accuracy ±4.5% RH) but does NOT control humidity — regulates fan speed based on temperature and negative pressure only. Three adjustable parameters: temperature (20-30°C), minimum speed (20-100%), negative pressure (50-100%). Case: 130x80x70mm; controller: 160x100x90mm. TRIAC 2x16A. IP54 (16A version) / IP44 (10A version). Amazon.de B004O298I0 is the 2A/2x200W variant; 10A and 16A variants also available.

supported_devices: EC fans
port_types: 3.5mm jack 4-pole (2x fan output)
compatible_ec_fans: EC fans with 4-pole 3.5mm jack connector
recommended_use_note: EC-fan-only climate controller with LCD display and included AC adapter. For use with EC fans using proprietary 4-pole 3.5mm connectors. Not compatible with standard AC fans. IP20 — indoor use only.
uvp_notes: FC15-FR variant at approx. €160 incl. VAT (led-grower.eu). EU-plug variant FC15-EU listed at approx. €144. UK retailers list at £185-207 GBP.
notes: Model code FC15-FR (or FC15-EU for EU-plug variant). Controller unit: 98x61x20mm; weight 2.5kg as listed by multiple retailers (likely includes power supply and cables). Powered by included 12VDC AC adapter. Fan control via low-voltage signal through 4-pole 3.5mm jacks — fans require own power supply. Graphic LCD + 3-button keyboard. 15 programmable settings: temperature/humidity/speed/pressure for day and night. Built-in light sensor for automatic day/night switching. Includes: controller, 12VDC power supply, temperature/humidity/light sensor (4m cable), 2x fan cables (4m each). IP20. No Amazon.de standalone listing found — sold bundled with GSE EC fans (e.g., ASIN B07H4M1S12 is a fan+controller bundle).

supported_devices: AC fans, EC fans
port_types: Schuko outlet (2x), RJ45 (2x)
compatible_ec_fans: any EC fan with 0-10V or PWM input via RJ45
recommended_use_note: Advanced grow room controller for mixed AC+EC fan setups. LCD display with rotary push knob. 15 programmable day/night settings for temperature, humidity, speed, and negative pressure. Built-in light sensor for automatic day/night switching.
uvp_notes: FC13-210FR (2x5A) at led-grower.eu. German retailers (growshop-germany.de, greenlight-shop.de) list at €222-249. A 16A variant also exists (Amazon.de B08X3LSY2V).
notes: Model FC13-210FR, EAN 010000013108. Case: 130x80x70mm; controller unit: 160x110x90mm; weight 0.65kg. Sensor cable 4m. Graphic LCD display; rotary push knob navigation. 15 programmable settings: temperature/humidity/speed/pressure for day and night. Two internal overheat sensors. RJ45 supports 0-10V or PWM for EC fans; two Schuko outlets for AC fans via TRIAC. IP54. Amazon.de B08X3LSY2V listed as '16A variant' — may differ from standard 2x5A model.

supported_devices: humidifier or dehumidifier (one device at a time)
port_types: Schuko outlet x1
recommended_use_note: Dedicated humidity controller for connecting a single humidifier or dehumidifier; mode selected via hysteresis direction (positive = humidify, negative = dehumidify); waterproof housing for grow environments
uvp_notes: Price for 10A variant from led-grower.eu (Lithuania). 15A variant listed at £142.95 GBP (1-hydroponics.co.uk). Available in 10A (ED61-208FR) and 15A variants.
notes: Controls ONE device: either humidifier OR dehumidifier — not both simultaneously. Humidity set point 30–100%; hysteresis -10% to -1% for dehumidifier mode, +1% to +10% for humidifier mode. Two analogue knobs (no display). Sensor cable 4 m. Sensor housing (probe): 130x80x70 mm; controller unit: 160x100x90 mm. IP54.

supported_devices: conventional AC fans (non-EC only)
port_types: Schuko outlet x2
recommended_use_note: Controls conventional AC fans in 6 voltage steps (80–230 V) based on temperature and humidity; eliminates fan hum at low speeds; suitable for humid grow environments (IP54); not compatible with EC fans
uvp_notes: Price for 8A 2-fan model. 2.5A variants available from ~€239.95 (growxpert.de). Amazon.de ASIN B08X3KNPV5 is the 2.5A version.
notes: Six output voltage steps: 80 V, 110 V, 140 V, 170 V, 200 V, 230 V. NOT compatible with EC fans — step transformer technology incompatible with EC fan electronics. Available in 2.5A (1-fan FC04-202, 2-fan FC06-202) and 8A (1-fan, 2-fan) variants. Sensor cable extendable to 50 m. Dimensions are for the 8A 2-fan full controller unit. Temperature set range: 20–30°C; hysteresis 2–8°C. Humidity accuracy ±4.5% RH.

supported_devices: grow lights (HPS, CMH, LED), heating elements
port_types: Schuko outlet x4 (lighting), Schuko outlet x1 (heating, auto-activates when lights off)
recommended_use_note: Heavy-duty contactor-based timer box for scheduling HPS/CMH grow lights; heating socket automatically activates when lights switch off; available in 4x600W, 8x600W, and 12x600W configurations
uvp_notes: Price for 4x600W + heating version. 12x600W + heating version ~€209.90 (bloomtech.de). Amazon.de ASIN B08X3MG7MQ is the 12x600W variant.
notes: Available in 4x600W (5 ports, 16A, 3600W, 500x160x115mm, 3.0 kg), 8x600W and 12x600W (13 ports, 33A, 7200W) variants — all include heating socket. Specs and dimensions given are for 4x600W version. Heating socket activates automatically when lights switch off (not user-programmable separately). 24-hour mechanical timer (Hager) with 30-minute intervals and 150-hour battery backup. Contactors from Iskra. IP54. 10,000,000 relay cycles rated. Amazon ASIN B08X3MG7MQ is the 12x600W + heating version.

supported_devices: irrigation pumps (Ebb & Flow, drip, NFT)
port_types: Schuko outlet, light sensor cable (4m)
compatible_sensors: built-in light sensor (4m cable, day/night detection only)
recommended_use_note: Standalone day/night irrigation timer with built-in light sensor; programs separate pulse duration and rest intervals for day and night cycles; suited for Ebb & Flow, drip, and NFT systems
uvp_notes: 8A model; retailer price varies by market; 10A variant available at higher price (~€116)
notes: Available in 8A (1800W) and 10A (2450W) variants. Amazon.de listing B00LB6Q6HS is for the 8A version. Housing dimensions 130×80×70mm refer to main enclosure; full unit with sockets is 145×100×90mm. Built-in light sensor detects day/night photoperiod to switch between separate day and night irrigation schedules. IP54 waterproof housing. No network connectivity of any kind.

supported_devices: HID grow lights (up to 9×600W at 380V / 4×600W at 230V), AC fans (intake/exhaust), irrigation pumps
port_types: Schuko outlet (multiple), CEE16 3-pole 16A input
compatible_lights: HID 600W ballast lights (up to 9 at 380V 3-phase, up to 4 at 230V single-phase)
compatible_sensors: temperature sensor (included with fan controller)
recommended_use_note: All-in-one hardwired panel for HID-based grow rooms; combines 24h light timer, temperature/negative-pressure fan controller, and pulse irrigation timer in one enclosure; requires 380V 3-phase for full 9-lamp capacity
uvp_notes: German retailer starting price; UK retailer (1-hydroponics.co.uk) lists at £440.95 GBP; price varies by configuration
notes: Hardwired all-in-one grow room control panel integrating: (1) 24h lighting timer with 36h power reserve for 9×600W HID lamps at 380V 3-phase (4 lamps at 230V), (2) digital temperature + negative-pressure fan controller, (3) second-pulse irrigation timer. Protection class IP44. Case dimensions 200×430×95mm. CEE16 3-phase input connector. Some German retailers show as out of stock; product may be legacy/limited production. Not sold on Amazon.de.

supported_devices: HID magnetic ballast lights, LED lights, AC fans (variable speed), heaters, coolers, humidifiers, dehumidifiers, CO2 equipment, irrigation pumps; temperature/humidity/light/CO2/pH/EC sensors (via sensor bus)
port_types: Schuko outlet (10x: 4 ballast relay, 4 general relay, 2 variable AC-fan), sensor/satellite addressing port (4x onboard, expandable to 30)
compatible_lights: HID magnetic ballast, LED (relay/timer control); dimming via light dimming output
compatible_sensors: SGC temperature/humidity/light sensor (included), optional SGC CO2, pH, EC, water sensors (addressable bus, up to 30 units)
compatible_co2_equipment: any 230V CO2 equipment
recommended_use_note: Professional self-contained grow room computer; operates fully offline on local LAN/WiFi; browser-based interface from any device; supports up to 30 sensors and logic-gate automation rules; no cloud or subscription required
uvp_notes: Base 230V EU price; 400V 3-phase version +€20; UK socket +€30; growbox.ch lists at CHF 698
notes: Self-contained Linux ARM computer (AM335x 1GHz Cortex-A8, 512MB DDR3, 32GB SD card). 10 relay sockets: 4 for HID magnetic ballasts (up to 3600W each), 4 general-purpose (up to 3600W each), 2 variable AC-fan sockets (2×1150W with phase-controlled speed modulator 0-100%). Sensor bus supports up to 30 SGC sensors/satellites. Full privacy: no data sent to any cloud server; operates autonomously offline; optional remote access via VPN/HTTPS. Browser-based UI (Firefox/Chrome; Windows 10 recommended; MAC/Safari untested). Automation supports AND/OR/NOT/NOR/NAND/XOR/XNOR logic gates, timer (24h/weekly/monthly/yearly), and sensor threshold triggers. Email alerts for disconnections and alarms. Free version includes basic controls; Full version unlocks CO2 controller, speed controller, and advanced logic. Includes SGC Temp/Humidity/Light sensor (4m cable) and demo software. 400V 3-phase variant also available. Not sold on Amazon.de. Weight 3.65 kg (1-phase version).

supported_devices: 24VAC solenoid irrigation valves, water pump relay
port_types: 4x 24VAC zone wire terminals, common terminal (C), master valve terminal (M), rain sensor input, 24VAC power adapter input
compatible_sensors: Optional rain sensor (not included)
recommended_use_note: 4-zone WiFi irrigation timer for 24VAC solenoid valves; suitable for automated watering schedules in grow rooms; indoor use only (not waterproof)
uvp_notes: Regular price €75.99; sale price €69.99 observed on eu.inkbird.com at time of research
notes: 4-zone indoor WiFi sprinkler controller; app compatibility iOS 13+/Android 7.1+; OTA firmware updates; 4 cyclic schedule modes (days of week, odd/even days, interval); 6 start times per zone; 6-month watering history in app; non-volatile memory retains settings on power loss; EU adapter input AC230V 50Hz, controller input 24VAC 1A; not waterproof

supported_devices: 24VAC solenoid irrigation valves, water pump relay
port_types: 6x 24VAC zone wire terminals, common terminal (C), master valve terminal (M), rain sensor input, 24VAC power adapter input
compatible_sensors: Optional rain sensor (not included)
recommended_use_note: 6-zone WiFi irrigation timer for 24VAC solenoid valves; suitable for automated watering schedules in grow rooms; indoor/outdoor use
uvp_notes: Regular price €89.99; sale price €79.99 observed on eu.inkbird.com at time of research
notes: 6-zone indoor/outdoor WiFi sprinkler controller; app compatibility iOS 11+/Android 5+; 4 cyclic schedule modes; 6 start times per zone; 6-month watering history in app; non-volatile memory retains settings on power loss; seasonal adjustment -90% to 100% in 10% increments; device dimensions same form factor as IIC-400-WIFI

supported_devices: 24VAC solenoid irrigation valves, water pump relay
port_types: 8x 24VAC zone wire terminals, common terminal (C), master valve terminal (M), 2x rain sensor inputs, 24VAC power adapter input
compatible_sensors: Up to 2 optional rain sensors (not included)
recommended_use_note: 8-zone WiFi irrigation timer for 24VAC solenoid valves; suitable for larger grow rooms with multiple irrigation zones; includes weatherproof cover for indoor/outdoor use
uvp_notes: Price €109.99 observed on eu.inkbird.com at time of research; multiple Amazon.de ASINs exist (also B0G1XXSV17)
notes: 8-zone indoor/outdoor WiFi sprinkler controller with LCD backlight display; supports up to 2 rain sensors; includes weatherproof cover for outdoor installation; built-in super capacitor maintains date/time during power outages; app compatibility iOS 11+/Android 5+; 4 cyclic schedule modes; 6 start times per zone; 6-month watering history; seasonal adjustment -90% to 100%; OTA firmware updates supported

supported_devices: CO2 generators, CO2 regulators, exhaust fans
port_types: 2x EU outlet (WORK1 CO2 source, WORK2 exhaust fan), CO2 sensor port
compatible_sensors: Inkbird S01 NDIR CO2 sensor, Inkbird B01 NDIR CO2 sensor
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 regulator or generator
recommended_use_note: Standalone CO2 controller for grow rooms and greenhouses. Dual relay controls CO2 source and exhaust fan simultaneously. Requires Inkbird S01 or B01 NDIR CO2 sensor (included in standard bundle). Dual display shows measured and set CO2 simultaneously.
uvp_notes: Price includes S01 NDIR CO2 sensor. Also available bundled with B01 sensor.
notes: NDIR CO2 sensing; range 0–9999 ppm; accuracy ±(30 ppm + 3% MV). Sensor warm-up/stabilization ~120 s after power-on. Dual relay: WORK1 for CO2 source, WORK2 for exhaust fan. CE & FCC certified. Also available in UK, AU, and US plug versions. Package gross weight ~0.65 kg (package 20×9×11 cm; device dimensions not found in manufacturer sources).

supported_devices: CO2 generators, CO2 regulators, ventilation/exhaust fans
port_types: 2x EU outlet (CO2 device, exhaust fan), CO2 sensor port
compatible_sensors: Inkbird S01 NDIR CO2 sensor (included)
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 regulator or generator
recommended_use_note: CO2 controller with integrated photo sensor for automatic day/night CO2 management (CO2 on during lights-on, off at lights-off). Three modes: Plant with fan, Plant without fan, Human mode. Higher accuracy and faster sampling than ICC-500T.
uvp_notes: Price includes S01 NDIR CO2 sensor.
notes: Newer/successor to ICC-500T. Integrated photo sensor in CO2 sensor module auto-disables CO2 at night (light-off detection). CO2 range 0–9999 ppm; accuracy ±(50 ppm + 5%) from 400–9999 ppm; sampling every 1 s. Controller dimensions: 162×72×35 mm; CO2 sensor: 103×102×43 mm. Stated weight 583 g is for full kit (controller + sensor). 5-year sensor warranty, 2-year controller warranty. Also available in UK plug version. Two calibration methods: general and professional.

supported_devices: humidifiers, dehumidifiers
port_types: 2x EU outlet (WORK1 humidifier, WORK2 dehumidifier), humidity probe connector
recommended_use_note: WiFi-enabled dual-stage humidity controller with remote monitoring and control via free INKBIRD app (iOS/Android). Suitable for grow rooms, terrariums, mushroom growing, and greenhouses. 2.4 GHz WiFi only.
notes: WiFi variant of IHC-200. 2.4 GHz only (IEEE 802.11b/g/n); 5 GHz not supported. Max load: 1200 W at 120 V, 2200 W at 220 V (per manufacturer). Device operates autonomously without internet; remote monitoring via Inkbird app likely requires cloud. Also available in UK plug version.

supported_devices: humidifiers, dehumidifiers
port_types: 2x EU outlet (WORK1 humidifier, WORK2 dehumidifier), humidity probe connector
recommended_use_note: Standalone dual-stage humidity controller for grow rooms, terrariums, mushroom growing, and greenhouses. Controls one humidifier and one dehumidifier simultaneously via two relay outputs.
notes: Humidity-only controller; no temperature sensing. External capacitive humidity probe (2 m cable) included. Body: 140x68x33 mm; separate outlet socket module: 85x42x24 mm. Max 10 A, 100–240 V AC. Humidity range 5–99.99 %RH, accuracy ±3 %RH. Compressor delay protection and calibration supported. Also available in UK plug version.

supported_devices: heaters, coolers, humidifiers, dehumidifiers (dual relay, selectable operating mode)
port_types: 2x outlet (US NEMA; EU Schuko if EU version), temperature probe port, humidity probe port
recommended_use_note: 3-in-1 standalone controller selectable per mode: temperature controller with 12-period programmable timer, humidity controller, or dual temperature controller. Dual relay output. ETL listed (US). Temperature range -40 to 100 °C.
uvp_notes: USD price from US Inkbird store. EUR price not confirmed; EU inkbird.com product page returned 404 at research date.
notes: Primary market is US (120 V / 15 A / 1800 W, ETL listed). Dimensions and max-load figures are US-version data. No Amazon.de listing found. EU product page (eu.inkbird.com) returned 404 as of 2026-06-28; EU replacement probes are sold, suggesting partial EU market presence. Operates in one mode at a time (not simultaneous temp+humidity control). Humidity probe is sold separately or in specific bundles; base product includes one temperature probe. 12-period timer enables different temperature setpoints across day/night cycles.

supported_devices: Heaters, heating mats, heat lamps (heating only)
port_types: EU Schuko outlet ×2 (both heating only), NTC temperature probe
compatible_lights: any (on/off only)
recommended_use_note: WiFi-enabled heating-only controller with app-configurable day/night temperature timer. Both outlets are heating outputs. Day/night schedules and alarm thresholds adjustable remotely via Inkbird app. Operates as standalone thermostat without internet. 2.4GHz WiFi only.
notes: Heating ONLY — no cooling outlet. Both sockets heat simultaneously. Day/night cycle: two temperature setpoints (TS1 day, TS2 night) configurable via Inkbird app or directly on device. App: Inkbird (2.4GHz WiFi required). Temperature history logging and push alerts via app. Max load: 10A at 100-240V AC (EU max wattage not explicitly stated). Amazon.de ASIN B094FL4BVK identified from search (URL path confirmed WIFI variant); verify listing before use.

supported_devices: Heaters, heating mats, heat lamps (heating only)
port_types: EU Schuko outlet ×2 (both heating only), NTC temperature probe
compatible_lights: any (on/off only)
recommended_use_note: Heating-ONLY controller with 24h day/night two-temperature cycle timer. Both outlets are heating outputs (no cooling outlet). Two independent temperature setpoints (day temp and night temp) programmable directly on device. Useful for maintaining different temperatures during light-on vs light-off periods.
notes: Heating ONLY — no cooling outlet. Both sockets heat simultaneously. Day/night cycle: two temperature setpoints (TS1 day, TS2 night) with independent hysteresis values. Built-in capacitor maintains timer for 20+ days without power. Temperature range -50~99°C. NTC probe, 2m. Max load: 10A at 100-240V AC (EU max wattage not explicitly stated by manufacturer). No Amazon.de ASIN confirmed during research.

supported_devices: Heaters, cooling devices (fans, AC units, refrigerators, chillers)
port_types: EU Schuko outlet ×2 (1 heating outlet, 1 cooling outlet), NTC temperature probe
compatible_ec_fans: any (on/off only)
compatible_lights: any (on/off only)
recommended_use_note: WiFi-enabled dual-stage thermostat. Adds remote monitoring, app-based alarm notifications, and temperature history logging to the standard ITC-308. Works as a standalone thermostat without internet; app remote access requires cloud. 2.4GHz WiFi only.
uvp_notes: Listed as sold out on eu.inkbird.com as of research date; price retained from listing
notes: 2.4GHz WiFi only (no 5GHz support). App: Inkbird (iOS 11.0+ / Android 5.0+). Temperature history logging and remote alarm push notifications via app. Compressor delay protection. NTC probe rated IP68. Amazon.de listing confirmed as 'Inkbird ITC-308-WIFI Thermostat mit App-Fernsteuerung' (ASIN B07MG45T73).

supported_devices: Heaters, cooling devices (fans, AC units, refrigerators, chillers)
port_types: EU Schuko outlet ×2 (1 heating outlet, 1 cooling outlet), NTC temperature probe
compatible_ec_fans: any (on/off only)
compatible_lights: any (on/off only)
recommended_use_note: Dual-stage plug-and-play thermostat: heating outlet activates when temp falls below setpoint, cooling outlet activates when temp rises above setpoint + hysteresis. Simple on/off control, no scheduling or app. Entry-level temperature controller for grow tents.
notes: Fixed (non-replaceable) NTC probe, 2m cable, rated IP68 waterproof (body and socket not waterproof). Compressor delay protection for cooling device. Dual display shows measured temperature and setpoint simultaneously. Buzzer alarm for high/low temp and sensor fault.

supported_devices: Heaters, cooling devices (fans, AC units, refrigerators, chillers)
port_types: EU Schuko outlet ×2 (1 heating outlet, 1 cooling outlet), plug-in replaceable NTC temperature probe socket
compatible_ec_fans: any (on/off only)
compatible_lights: any (on/off only)
recommended_use_note: Like ITC-308 but with plug-in replaceable NTC probe (socket design). Ideal when probe replacement is expected (aquarium, high-humidity environments). Includes separate socket unit (85×42×24mm). No scheduling or app.
notes: Key distinction from ITC-308: probe uses a plug-in socket (replaceable). Includes separate socket unit (85×42×24mm). Same dual-stage heating+cooling logic as ITC-308. Compressor delay protection. Buzzer alarm for high/low temp and sensor fault. Amazon.de ASIN B01AXQKAAK confirmed as 'Inkbird ITC-308S Digital Thermostat'.

supported_devices: LED grow lights (dimming via RJ12 daisy-chain, up to 40 in series); supplemental LED bars UV/IR/RED/BLUE (on/off via iHub-4AC expansion)

supported_manufacturer_series: FC, FC-E, SP3000, TS

notes: Primarily a light controller via RJ12 daisy-chain (up to 40 lights); monitors temperature/humidity/VPD/CO2/PPFD but does not directly actuate climate devices without iHub-4AC; iHub-4AC 2.0 (current) is NOT compatible — only original iHub-4AC worked with Controller 43; iControl (2025) is the direct successor with expanded capabilities; 12V DC power supply included; dimensions from US retailer listing

supported_devices: Mars Hydro FC, FC-E, SP3000 LED grow lights (2024+ smart versions); Mars Hydro iFresh fans and iTime smart accessories via RJ12 expansion port
port_types: USB (to light dimmer port), RJ12 expansion

compatible_lights: Mars Hydro FC, FC-E, SP3000 (2024+ smart versions only; pre-2024 models not supported)

recommended_use_note: USB dongle plugging into the light's dimmer port; one unit per light fixture; multiple iConnectu units manageable simultaneously via MarsPro app; low-cost entry into the Mars Hydro smart ecosystem

notes: Current 2025 iteration of the iConnect product line; 'iConnectu' adds WiFi to the original Bluetooth-only iConnect; continues light schedule operation offline after initial WiFi setup; RJ12 expansion port links with Mars Hydro iFresh fans and iTime; only compatible with FC, FC-E, SP3000 featuring 2024+ smart USB dimmer port; Amazon.de ASIN B0D5CJ5LHB confirmed

supported_devices: Mars Hydro LED grow lights (2024+ FC, FC-E, SP3000 series with RJ12 smart port)
port_types: RJ12
compatible_lights: Mars Hydro FC, FC-E, SP3000 series (2024+ models with RJ12 smart port); not compatible with older models or TS600
supported_manufacturer_series: FC, FC-E, SP3000
recommended_use_note: Entry-level smart light controller dongle; adds WiFi/Bluetooth app control (dimming, scheduling, sunrise/sunset) to compatible Mars Hydro LED lights only; no climate or fan control; plugs into LED driver RJ12 port
uvp_notes: Discounted to €13.29 from €19.99 on marshydro.eu; verify current price
notes: Compact USB-style dongle that plugs into the RJ12 smart port on compatible Mars Hydro LED lights. Light-only controller — cannot control fans, humidifiers, or any other devices. Works offline after initial setup (local_control: yes). RJ12 expansion port available. Temp/humidity monitoring reported as a feature (likely via RJ12 expansion or built-in sensor). Compatible with iFresh fan/iTime via MarsPro app ecosystem but no direct fan speed control from this device.

supported_devices: Any 230V devices via 4 smart outlets (on/off); Mars Hydro ADlite supplemental LED bars with synchronized control

compatible_ec_fans: any (on/off via outlet only; no speed control)

notes: Expansion module only — not standalone; requires Mars Hydro iControl (2025 version); NOT compatible with older Controller 43 (original iHub-4AC worked with Controller 43; this 2.0 redesign does not); 4 per-outlet modes: Manual, Timer, Cycle, Environmental (Temp/Humidity/CO2); daisy-chain up to 40 units; 230V EU Schuko plug; 13A total max (2990W combined); includes 1× RJ12 T-Shape Splitter and 1× 2.5m RJ12 Cord

supported_devices: LED grow lights, inline fans, clip fans, pumps, humidifiers, dehumidifiers, heaters, seedling heat mats, and other grow room equipment

notes: 6-outlet smart power strip; 110V-240V AC universal voltage; Bluetooth range up to 30m; WiFi unlimited range; includes temp/humidity probe sensor; dedicated heating-pad outlets (#1/#2 with USB for Mars Hydro heat mats); dedicated dimming outlet (#3 with USB + RJ12/RJ11 adapter) for one light; not found on amazon.de or marshydro.eu — appears US-market-only; likely being phased out by iHub Pro; Amazon.com ASIN B0BN2X8LSG (US)

supported_devices: Any standard AC devices: LED grow lights, fans, heat mats, humidifiers, drip irrigation pumps, routers, desk lamps, general home/office appliances
port_types: Schuko outlet (EU)
compatible_lights: any standard AC grow light
recommended_use_note: Simple dual-outlet smart timer with WiFi and Bluetooth; works with any AC device brand; no environmental sensing; up to 12 on/off schedules per outlet; 3–5 day internal battery backup preserves schedules when unplugged
uvp_notes: EU price €31.99 (discounted from €39.99); verify current price
notes: Dual-outlet wall plug-in smart timer (2-in-1). Two outlets can be controlled independently or synchronised. Scheduling precision down to the second. Supports multi-segment timing (up to 12 daily/weekly schedules) and cyclic/recycle timing mode. WiFi + Bluetooth via MarsPro app. 3–5 day internal battery backup for schedule retention. EU rated 230V / 13A / 2990W total. US version also available (125V / 13A / 1625W, ASIN B0DSVFMXX5 on amazon.com).

supported_devices: Mars Hydro LED grow lights (FC, FC-E, TS, SP3000, SP3000R, ADlite100), iFresh inline fans, clip fans, Mars Hydro humidifiers; non-RJ12 AC devices (humidifiers, dehumidifiers, heaters) via iHub-4AC 2.0 expansion
port_types: RJ12

recommended_use_note: RJ12-only control hub; no built-in AC outlets; controls Mars Hydro lights and fans natively via RJ12; requires iHub-4AC 2.0 to control non-RJ12 AC devices (humidifiers, heaters, dehumidifiers); expandable with iHub Pro or iHub-4AC 2.0
uvp_notes: Base unit €49.99; bundle configurations up to €136.99 with sensor add-ons
notes: No built-in AC outlets — control of non-RJ12 AC devices (humidifiers, dehumidifiers, heaters) requires iHub-4AC 2.0 expansion (sold separately). Controls up to 2 light groups, 1 clip fan group, 1 inline fan natively via RJ12. Stage-based automation (seedling, veg, flower). Supports daisy-chaining up to 40 lights. MarsPro app. DC 12V powered (PSU included).

supported_devices: Any standard AC devices: humidifiers, dehumidifiers, exhaust fans, heaters, heat mats, drip pumps (on/off, timer, cycle, environment-triggered); requires Mars Hydro iControl (2025) to operate

Incompatible with older Controller 43. 4 outlets each with 4 modes: Manual, Timer, Cycle, Environment (uses iControl sensor data). Daisy-chainable up to 40 units. EU max load 2990W / 13A total across all 4 outlets. Amazon.de ASIN B0FG34BP9D may cover both original iHub-4AC and 2.0 versions — confirm listing title before purchase.

uvp_notes: Base unit €85.49; up to €169.99 with sensor bundle add-ons

RJ12 ports for sensors and device communication. 6 control modes per outlet. Includes temp/humidity sensor; PPFD, CO2, soil sensors sold separately. WiFi + Bluetooth. MarsPro app. DC 12V powered.

supported_devices: CO2 boosters, CO2 solenoid valves, exhaust fans
port_types: Schuko outlet (CO2 booster/solenoid output), Schuko outlet (exhaust fan output), built-in NDIR CO2 sensor, built-in light sensor
compatible_co2_equipment: CO2 boosters, CO2 solenoid valves, CO2 enrichment systems
recommended_use_note: Dual-function CO2 controller: activates CO2 booster/solenoid when CO2 falls below setpoint; switches on exhaust fan when CO2 exceeds setpoint. Built-in light sensor restricts CO2 enrichment to the light period only (CO2+ mode).
uvp_notes: Retailer prices vary widely: €335.85 (eugardencenter.com), €403.71 (growtent.eu), €420.00 (bloomtech.de). 2S International manufacturer/distributor price used as UVP.
notes: Built-in SenseAir NDIR CO2 sensor. CO2 measurement range 0–5000 ppm, accuracy ±30 ppm ±3%, response time 20 s, sample rate 0.5 Hz. Operating temp 0–50°C, humidity 0–95% RH non-condensing. Display shows live CO2 ppm reading. Exhaust fan output is on/off relay (not speed-controlled). Max 10A total across both outputs. No Amazon.de listing found. Available in EU, UK, AUS versions. 5-year warranty.

supported_devices: Dual fans (1x intake + 1x exhaust), standard AC induction fans
port_types: 2x Schuko outlet (IN/OUT), NTC probe socket, light sensor socket
compatible_ec_fans: Not recommended; transformer output incompatible with most EC fans; designed for AC induction fans
compatible_sensors: SMSCOM NTC temperature sensor (included, 5m), SMSCOM light sensor (optional, sold separately)
recommended_use_note: Silent 5-step transformer-based dual fan controller; completely eliminates fan buzz and hum; best for standard AC induction fans; optional light sensor activates night humidity extraction (PRO function)
uvp_notes: Manufacturer RRP for 4A variant; 8A and 16A variants also available; German street prices €259–320 for 4A
notes: Available in 4A, 8A, and 16A variants; heavy transformer-based design (~7.8 kg for 4A); 5-step mechanical fan speed control; completely silent operation (no buzz or hum from fans); PRO software built-in and activated when optional light sensor is connected; without light sensor there is no night humidity program; Hybrid Controller Pro Mk2 is the same unit bundled with light sensor; dimensions from all4plants for 4A EU variant; 5-year warranty

supported_devices: Dual fans (1x intake + 1x exhaust), standard AC induction fans

supported_devices: Dual fans (1x intake + 1x exhaust), AC induction and phase-control-compatible EC fans
port_types: 2x Schuko outlet (IN/OUT), NTC probe socket, light sensor socket
compatible_ec_fans: AC induction fans; phase-control-compatible EC fans only

notes: Available in 4.5A (1000W) and 7A (1600W) variants; adds light sensor port and PRO night humidity program vs standard Twin Controller Mk2; light sensor sold separately; supports slave unit daisy-chaining; 5m NTC temperature sensor and spare fuse included; 5-year warranty; control_humidity=partial reflects indirect humidity management (timed fan speed increase, no humidity sensor)

supported_devices: irrigation pumps, drip systems
port_types: Schuko outlet (pump output)
recommended_use_note: Pre-programmed drip irrigation timer for hydroponic and soil grow systems. User selects light cycle (12/12 or 18/6) and sets drip duration in seconds; timer automatically manages feeding frequency throughout the day (more feeds at start, fewer toward end of light period).
uvp_notes: Retail prices: €179.90 (growmart.eu). 2S International manufacturer/distributor price used as UVP.
notes: Pure pre-programmed timer — no sensor inputs, no user-programmable rule logic. Fixed schedule: 19 drip cycles per day for 18/6 cycle, 20 cycles for 12/12 cycle. Only user adjustment is drip duration (0–99 seconds) and light-cycle mode selection. Max load listed as 4A (max ~920W at 230V); some retailer listings state 2000W which is inconsistent and likely incorrect for the EU version. Amazon.de search found possible listing ASIN B00BM50BZ6 but Mk2 designation not confirmed — not included. Available in EU, UK, AUS versions. 5-year warranty.

supported_devices: intake fans, exhaust fans
port_types: 2x Schuko outlet (fan output), NTC temperature sensor input, expansion port (for SPC Slave Mk2 units)
compatible_ec_fans: any
recommended_use_note: Available in 8A and 16A variants. Controls intake and exhaust fan speed via temperature sensor to maintain set temperature and air pressure. Expandable with up to 5 SPC Slave Mk2 units. IP54 moisture protection.
uvp_notes: Price is for 16A variant. 8A variant lower (approx. €189–249 retail). Amazon.de ASIN B075ZYDNQF confirmed as 16A version.
notes: Two variants: 8A (max ~1840W, ~1.76 kg) and 16A (max ~3680W, ~2.00 kg). Dimensions and weight are for the 16A variant. Analog phase-control technology — no firmware, no digital display, rotary knobs only. Expandable with up to 5 SPC Slave Mk2 units. NTC temperature sensor (5 m cable) and spare fuse included. 5-year warranty. Also available in UK, Swiss, AUS plug variants.

Rotary knobs for temp setpoint (10–45°C) and hysteresis (1–7°C). Spare fuse included.

Can read and display CO2 from optional S-4 sensor (monitoring only; no CO2 equipment control). Temperature alarm via NC contact output. LCD with auto-off backlight (60 s). Incompatible with TechGrow Probe and S-2/S-Eco sensors — requires Temp/RH or S-4 type.

Sensor not included; 5m UTP cable included. TechGrow DL-1 datalogger compatible via third UTP port. Incompatible with S-2 and temp probe sensor types.

No day/night scheduling. Sensor not included; 5m UTP cable included. TechGrow DL-1 datalogger compatible. Incompatible with S-2 sensors.

notes: Model number GH-A22S. EU version rated 15A/3600W at 240V (US version is 15A/1800W at 120V). WiFi 2.4GHz only. US product page dimensions: 5x1.8x1.3 inches (EU dimensions unconfirmed). ASIN B0DCHFZN65 confirmed on Amazon.de.
